highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Ramdeobaba University?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions are currently open at Ramdeobaba University. Interested candidates can apply for both UG and PG courses in the stream of Management, Engineering, Humanities, Science, etc., by visiting the official website of Ramdeobaba University.

college_info.intro: Ramdeobaba University offers over 50 programmes across 9 different schools. The flagship programmes offered at Ramdeobaba University include BTech, BSc and MBA. The course duration varies from 2-year to 5 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by Ramdeobaba University & their respective eligibility and RBU fee structure:

placements.overview: Ramdeobaba University concluded its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2024. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Ramdeobaba University placements in 2024 was INR 50 LPA and INR 6.9 LPA, respectively. The university attracted more than 98 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc. The top recruiters of Ramdeobaba University placements in 2024 included Accenture, IBM, TCS, DE Shaw & Co, CISCO, Schneider Electric, Amadeus, Adani Group, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Siemens, etc. Some of the key highlights of Ramdeobaba University placements 2024 by the NIRF report are tabulated below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ramdeobaba University is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fee structure for the Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management programmes is around INR 65,217 to 10,86,955.

faqs.answer: A:    For addmision to MBA programme at Ramdeobaba University, candidates need to qualify for either state or national-level entrance exams. These are MAH MBA CET/ MAT/ CAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ CET conducted by other state. The final admission is done based on candidates past academics and entrance exam scores.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for admission to MBA at Ramdeobaba University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Ramdeobaba University accepts the MAT exam for admission to MBA. Additionally, the college has some basic eligibility criteria that differ from course to course i.e., if a candidates want to apply for an undergraduate course, they must have completed Class 12 in a relevant stream and if a candidates want to apply for PG courses they, must have a UG degree.
faqs.question: Does Ramdeobaba University accept MAT score?

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management is around INR 142610 - INR 556524.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to BTech at Ramdeobaba University candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. Further, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exam JEE Main, MHT CET, RUBEE and CUET. After fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to visit the official website of the university to apply online.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Analytics) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Is VNIT better than Ramdeobaba University?

review_content.Placements: My course is Data science, near about 60-65% of the students get placed in this course. The average package offered to a candidate from my batch is around 6 LPA. The highest package is around 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Accenture, Wipro, and Infosys come here for recruitment purposes. Top 15-20% of the students get internships in this course. Top roles include data analyst, data scientist, business analyst, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities for this course here are great. Students get well-furnished classrooms. AC rooms along with new and upgraded computer systems. Labs are very good here with facilities like smart board and so on. Library is good here students get almost all the books required. Hostel price is a little high as per the facilities. The rooms are also very short and not clean properly. But the food in canteen and mess is very hygienic and affordable and also tastes good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Analytics) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shri Ramdeobaba University.

review_content.Placements: I am doing data science course here, and almost 70%-80% of the students in this course get placed every year. The highest package offered in this course is around 19 LPA, with an average package of 5 LPA-6 LPA, with a minimum of 3.5 LPA. Top companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, and so on come here for recruitment purposes. Top 15%-20% of the students get internships here. Roles like data analyst, data scientist, and business analyst are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of classrooms and labs is quite well-maintained here, you get all the facilities like air-conditioned rooms, Wi-Fi, proper computer systems, and a good library with all the books and facilities like tables and chairs available. The hostel facilities according to the cost are very bad here, rooms are very dirty and small, whereas the food quality at the mess and canteen concerning price is very good and it's very hygienic as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Analytics) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The truth behind Ramdeobaba University, Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: My course is data science, almost 80% of the students studying in this course get placed. The highest package offered till now in this course is 17 LPA with an average package of 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The minimum package goes up to 3 LPA - 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Accenture along with Amazon and many other big companies come here for recruitment. Top 10-15% of the students get internships in small startups. Roles offered in this course are data analyst, data scientist, business analyst, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of classrooms and all things for this course are excellent, facilities like Wi-Fi, proper computer systems with air-conditioned classrooms, and all are available here. Library is good, almost all the books required by the students are available here. Hostel prices are very high as per the room so hostel is not recommended here. You can go for PGs and all for living, whereas food quality brands' price is excellent in both canteen and mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Analytics) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The truth of Shri Ramdeobaba University, Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: I have opted for the data science course as it is a quite demanding field nowadays, almost 80% of students in my course have been placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA along with an average package of 6.5 LPA. Top companies like Accenture, Wipro, TCS, and Deloitte came here during the placement season. Almost the top 10% of students get internships in startups. Top roles offered are data analyst and data scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the class is good and well maintained along with all the facilities required for the students. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, proper monitor in the lab, and good classrooms, the library is a lot good with all the books available along with a good seating area. Hostel quality is not as good as the prices, the rooms are very short, and not cleaned properly as well, but the food quality of the mess as per the price is good, mess is very hygienic as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Preferred college among tier 3 colleges in Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students were placed with an average package of 4-5 LPA; the highest package was 23LPA and the lowest was 3.6 LPA. The top recruiting companies include D.E. Shaw, Nvidia, Porter, ZS, and CnR. Additionally, around 55% of students received internship plus PPO offers, with roles including SDE, SDET, and Platform as a Service Consultant.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college offers excellent facilities and infrastructure, including air-conditioned labs, Wi-Fi, and digital classrooms around the campus. The teaching staff is well-qualified. The boys' hostel can be rated as average, with rooms being quite small. The mess can be considered average to good, and other facilities, such as washrooms and water supply, adequately meet student needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing placements and vibrant campus.

review_content.Placements: Ramdeobaba University B.Tech in computer science has more than 90 percent placements with top companies like IBM, Cisco, and Accenture hiring. Salaries range from 7 LPA - 50 LPA. Students land roles in software, AI, and cloud, and secure internships at Google, AWS, and Microsoft.
review_content.Infrastructure: RBU provides Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, a huge library, and comfortable classrooms for CSE students. The hostels are clean and well-furnished, with a hygienic mess and food variety. There is also a medical center. We have sports facilities and a gym for students.

admission_overview.college_name: Ramdeobaba University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Ramdeobaba University admission isentrance and merit-basedfor courses offered atUG, PG, anddoctoral levels. Some of the popular exams accepted by the university for admission areJEE Main, GATE, andCAT, etc. TheRamdeobaba Universityoffers various courses to students in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Engineering, and IT & Software, among others.

At the UG level, the courses include BBA, and BTech, among others and at the PG level, the university offers, MTech, MCA, and MBA, among others. Candidates interested in Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management admission 2025 can check the below article for more details:

Ramdeobaba University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all the courses. Candidates looking for admission to any course are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to passClass 12from a recognised board and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree.

After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission. Want to know more about Ramdeobaba University course eligibility and selection criteria, go through the detailed breakdown:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Passed Class 10 and Class12 with Physics, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% aggregate ( 40% aggregate for reserved category)
JEE Main/MHTCET/ CET/CUET
Graduate with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university (45% aggregate for reserved category)
MAH MBA CET/MAT/CAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ CET conducted by other state
Passed Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any of the Science/Arts/Commerce groups with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
MH BBA CET/CUET/Other State CET Exam
Passed Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any of the Science/Arts/Commerce groups with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
MAH-BCA-CET/ CUET/ CET conducted by other states DTE
Passed Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent examination from the Science group, with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Merit-Based

Bachelor’s degree in the relevant field of Engineering and Technology from All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreRamdeobaba University courses
Download:Ramdeobaba University Admission Brochure

Ramdeobaba University admission 2025 is open. The university accepts various entrance exam scores such asMHT/CET/JEE/RUBEE/GATEor others for admission toBTech, BBA, BCA, MTech,and other courses. Further, for admission toPhD coursesthe university conducts its entrance exam i.e.,RBU-PET. Check below the step-by-stepRamdeobaba University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Ramdeobaba University Application Process 2025

Eligible candidates are required to apply online on the official website of Ramdeobaba University. Before applying, the candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities and qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses.
Step 2: Ramdeobaba University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit andentrance-based. The university has a predefined selection process for shortlisting candidates. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech,BBA,BCA, BSc,MBA, MTech, and other courses. Further, the university offers merit-based admission for other courses.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

After candidates are shortlisted, they are required to visit the university campus for document verification. Selected candidates are also required to pay theRamdeobaba University feeto confirm their admission.

paragraphs: As per the latest report, the participating recruiters presented 1,105 job offers to the students of the 2024 batch of courses like BTech , MBA , MCA , etc. The highest and average package offered during Ramdeobaba University placements in 2024 was INR 50 LPA and INR 6.9 LPA , respectively. The institute attracted more than 98 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Ramdeobaba University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Is VNIT better than Ramdeobaba University?
reviews.review_text: The facilities for this course here are great. Students get well-furnished classrooms. AC rooms along with new and upgraded computer systems. Labs are very good here with facilities like smart board and so on. Library is good here students get almost all the books required. Hostel price is a little high as per the facilities. The rooms are also very short and not clean properly. But the food in canteen and mess is very hygienic and affordable and also tastes good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ramdeobaba University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms and labs is quite well-maintained here, you get all the facilities like air-conditioned rooms, Wi-Fi, proper computer systems, and a good library with all the books and facilities like tables and chairs available. The hostel facilities according to the cost are very bad here, rooms are very dirty and small, whereas the food quality at the mess and canteen concerning price is very good and it's very hygienic as well.

reviews.review_heading: The truth behind Ramdeobaba University, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of classrooms and all things for this course are excellent, facilities like Wi-Fi, proper computer systems with air-conditioned classrooms, and all are available here. Library is good, almost all the books required by the students are available here. Hostel prices are very high as per the room so hostel is not recommended here. You can go for PGs and all for living, whereas food quality brands' price is excellent in both canteen and mess.

reviews.review_heading: The truth of Shri Ramdeobaba University, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the class is good and well maintained along with all the facilities required for the students. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, proper monitor in the lab, and good classrooms, the library is a lot good with all the books available along with a good seating area. Hostel quality is not as good as the prices, the rooms are very short, and not cleaned properly as well, but the food quality of the mess as per the price is good, mess is very hygienic as well.

reviews.review_heading: Preferred college among tier 3 colleges in Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: This college offers excellent facilities and infrastructure, including air-conditioned labs, Wi-Fi, and digital classrooms around the campus. The teaching staff is well-qualified. The boys' hostel can be rated as average, with rooms being quite small. The mess can be considered average to good, and other facilities, such as washrooms and water supply, adequately meet student needs.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing placements and vibrant campus.
reviews.review_text: RBU provides Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, a huge library, and comfortable classrooms for CSE students. The hostels are clean and well-furnished, with a hygienic mess and food variety. There is also a medical center. We have sports facilities and a gym for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramdeobaba University.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the college and department are good. Wi-Fi is available for students. Classrooms are of very high quality. There are 2 libraries in the college. The hostel is average. The quality of food in the mess is very good. The canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports turf, and grounds are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramdeobaba University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are also very great. Classrooms of the college have many facilities like classrooms are well furnished, also have smart boards for teaching, and Wi-Fi is also available for students. The hostel is situated in the college only and the size of the hostel room is also good.

reviews.review_heading: RCOEM'S review. I think this is one of the best colleges in Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were available for every department and classroom. Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries were well-maintained. Canteen facilities were available, with the best canteen service provided. The best mess food was available for students living in the hostel premises.

reviews.review_heading: RCOEM review: Campus, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good but average. Wi-Fi bandwidth is good and connectivity is impressive. Labs are well-monitored with a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are posh and well-cleaned. Libraries are good with a variety of books. There are three grounds for volleyball, basketball, and football. The canteen has some delicious food. The food in the mess is average. You can't expect non-veg in RCOEM.

reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of Ramdeobaba University.
reviews.review_text: Labs are top-notch. Wi-Fi system is safe and secure. Classrooms are well-maintained with smart boards. The library is maintained and top engineering books are available for students to issue. The college has a new lavish building for all computer-related courses which is fitted with the best labs, classrooms, high-speed lifts, and integrated basement parking.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for an MBA in Nagpur city.
reviews.review_text: In this college, there are the best facilities. A hostel facility is available. In this course, there are facilities like a department, auditorium, canteen, garden, gym, library, labs, classrooms, etc. This college organises sports and many games and tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is very good, except for the hostel. It is not too much good enough. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are very good compared to other colleges. There are 2 libraries on the campus. Wi-Fi is available for students and faculty members of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Improvement is going on day by day and placements in 2024 were good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All resources like a lab, computers, a library, and Wi-Fi are available. The canteen food is also good. Hostels are good and hygiene is maintained. Sports activities are also available. Competitions are there to participate. Events are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college was very good until it became a university.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is a bit small but is good. It has a library, labs, grounds, a canteen, and a hostel; it has good taste in food and has a small gym. Guards are good; building is good. Also has Wi-Fi, a basketball court, etc. The canteen is good and the food is also okay. And again they have lifts and many more facilities for students .

From this, 689 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.365000 and 103 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 1128 students were admitted, out of which 1068 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 684 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.397000 and 104 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2017-18, 1127 students were admitted, out of which 1144 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 806 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.400000 and 97 students got selected for higher studies.

faqs.answer: B.Tech. admissions to Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College (VRSEC) can be through several entrance examination scores :1. AP EAMCET: This is most popular entrance exam for admission in the Andhra Pradesh and carries weightage on the basis of obtained score of the exam.2. JEE Main: The result of JEE Main examination is also considered and serves as an option for those students who have written this test across the country.3. Management Quota: With regard to management quota students may directly apply and there are some prerequisites too.All candidates should preferably follow the updates on the current standard and that of the admission requirements on these exams.

faqs.answer: To be eligible for admission to BTech at Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College, the candidates need to score a minimum of 45% in class 12 in a relevant field from any recognized board. review_summary.college_name: VR Siddhartha Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and a peaceful environment.

content.Placements: 95 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 52.6 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. The least package is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Amazon, Cisco, Wipro, TCS, Deloitte, HSBC, PWC, and Flipkart. Almost all students who have good skills got internships. Roles offered are solution architect, quality analyst, developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Department facilities are good. Classrooms and labs are provided with Wi-Fi and AC. Our college has a central library where we can get any books. Coming to college, the food is good. Medical facilities are available. Every Wednesday, the doctor comes. We can play outdoor games as the ground is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with IT department. It has good facilities.

content.Placements: The 2025 batch placement is very strong. About 85% of students getting placed through campus placements. The average package offered is 3.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest package is 35 LPA. Top companies like Microsoft, Cognizant, Accenture, and TCS visit the campus and offer software roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course is decent. Wi-Fi is available. The library has all the required books. Hostel facilities are average, and the mess food quality is also average. The canteen prices are high. I do not see medical facilities during my college days. Sports facilities are available but are poorly maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: VR Siddhartha College of Engineering and Technology provides many courses to students.

content.Placements: In Mechanical, we get companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, Zomato, and Swiggy that offer jobs with a minimum package. Some students in our college participate in hackathons, which help them get internships at big MNC companies. They provide many opportunities to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. The quality of lab materials and classroom facilities are excellent. They provide certain competitions for students to improve their sportsmanship qualities. There are ground facilities for students to play cricket.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I absolutely love this college.

content.Placements: 60 to 70% of students get placed in our course. The highest package is about 50 LPA. The lowest package is about 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our course include Medha Servo, Hyundai, TCS, etc. Many students get internships in top companies. Top roles offered in our course include graduate engineer, R&D, design engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our department are very good. Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. A well-stocked library is available. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. Hostel food is also good. Canteen food is also good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College.

content.Placements: 85% of students got the placements in our college through campus interviews. The highest package for the last year is 44 LPA. The highest is from the AIML branch, not the IT branch. Mostly every year, the highest package is from CSE students. And the average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, and Amazon. We have also provided internships from the second year onwards. Our college provides good skills.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are very good. Our college is a university, so all exams and curriculum are designed by their own decisions. Our college is one of the best colleges in Vijayawada. The placements are also very good in our college. Classrooms are very good in our college. Good benches and digital boards are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available in our college at all times. Hostels are also very good in our college; the food is also very good.

paragraphs: VR Siddhartha Engineering College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, VR Siddhartha Engineering College considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and AP EAMCET for admission to specific courses.VR Siddhartha Engineering Collegeoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,91,280 - 3,06,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,20,000 - 1,54,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: Department facilities are good. Classrooms and labs are provided with Wi-Fi and AC. Our college has a central library where we can get any books. Coming to college, the food is good. Medical facilities are available. Every Wednesday, the doctor comes. We can play outdoor games as the ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with IT department. It has good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is decent. Wi-Fi is available. The library has all the required books. Hostel facilities are average, and the mess food quality is also average. The canteen prices are high. I do not see medical facilities during my college days. Sports facilities are available but are poorly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: VR Siddhartha College of Engineering and Technology provides many courses to students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. The quality of lab materials and classroom facilities are excellent. They provide certain competitions for students to improve their sportsmanship qualities. There are ground facilities for students to play cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I absolutely love this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our department are very good. Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. A well-stocked library is available. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. Hostel food is also good. Canteen food is also good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Velagapudi Ramakrishna Siddhartha Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are very good. Our college is a university, so all exams and curriculum are designed by their own decisions. Our college is one of the best colleges in Vijayawada. The placements are also very good in our college. Classrooms are very good in our college. Good benches and digital boards are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available in our college at all times. Hostels are also very good in our college; the food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: A college where dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms were excellent. Library was provided with wide number of books and research papers. When it comes to hostel, all the infrastructure and facilities were very good. We had a big ground, an indoor stadium, and a small gym with clean ambience.

reviews.review_heading: Join only if you have true passion for your career goals.
reviews.review_text: About Wi-Fi, it is available across the college and can be accessed using the student registration number; however, it does not work for faculty members. The labs have okay infrastructure, but in our branch, most of the equipment is old and mostly not working. Classrooms are good, equipped with projectors and proper ventilation. The library is the best in the college, with card access for every student and a wide range of books across many genres.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, I am satisfied. In 2025, really had good facilities in area. They should finalize area
reviews.review_text: Our college provided computers, Wi-Fi, and books. They provided good food. In the library, they could have provided a good types of books. Students in our college were evolving through the book, but they were limited. In the neutral being of nature, the college offered all types of information.

reviews.review_heading: A strong infrastructure, placements, and supportive faculty members - A worthwhile CCSE at VRSEC.
reviews.review_text: Hostels (725 = capacity both boys and girls) single/double groomed attached toilets, study lamps, laundry, 24X7 power backup, reading areas, wired Wi-Fi via 40 Cisco access points. The mess canteen serves both veg and non-veg. The 24-acre campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi across all zones.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our college Siddhartha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for information technology is quite decent and improving each year. All classrooms are equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and proper ventilation. The department has access to Wi-Fi, although the speed could fluctuate at times. The computer labs are fairly modern with up-to-date systems and reliable internet connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: About our Valagapudi Siddardha College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in V R Siddartha College are Wi-Fi and labs. There are good classrooms and also the quality of the facilities in the hostel is good. The mess and the canteen food in the college is superb. Sports and games are held.

reviews.review_heading: It is overall an average college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are fully air-conditioned with high-end systems and fast internet. Classrooms are equipped with smart boards. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Hostels are clean and secure, but rooms do not have AC. Mess food is decent and hygienic. Sports and medical facilities are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is good to study and enjoy college life very happily.
reviews.review_text: It has a good hostel and study environment. In the hostel, the food is good compared to other hostels. There are good in charges in the hostel. It has a friendly environment. We have a ground, and we can play games in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements and solid infrastructure, with scope for more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and good internet connectivity. Wi-Fi facility is available across the campus. Classrooms are spacious and have smart boards and the library is well-stocked with technical books, journals, and access to digital resources like NPTEL and IEEE. The campus is clean and green with good overall maintenance. The hostel facilities, hostels are decent, with basic furniture and a 24/7 water and electricity supply. Wi-Fi facility is availa...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements across the years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good in our college. The maintenance of labs and classrooms is excellent. There is a department library available in the department where students can go through many course-related books. There is Wi-Fi facility available in the department.

college_info.intro:
CGC University offers courses at UG and PG levels. BTech, BSc and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university. The university offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The university cover core courses in the areas of HR, Marketing, Finance, Operation Management, Business Analytics and Digital Marketing.
CGC University offers a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including CSE, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Block Chain Technology, Cloud Computing, Robotics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc. CGC University courses enhances learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. review_summary.college_name: CGC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Cyber Security - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Admission to the university is highly recommended.

content.Placements: The placement drive CGC University offers a high rate of recruitment (86 percent). Big industries like Amazon, IBM, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Adobe visit the campus and hire the best talent of the university. The average package offered to students is 12 LPA, and the highest package offered is 50 LPA. The average internship rate is 84 percent in various tech companies like Adobe, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. The canteen serves hygienic and nutritious food. It offers 24x7 medical help.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placement, AI-driven.

content.Placements: We have a very high placement rate in our college. Our seniors have got jobs within and even out of the campus with more than 30 LPA. Even more than 50 companies visit the campus with the best offers to the students. The future is in safe hands.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.

content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed, and the highest package of 2026 is 87 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA. All the big companies come to our college. On December 23rd, there was a placement day where all 4th-year students celebrated their placements. All facilities were also enjoyed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.

content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.
content.Faculty: My course has more practical work, and it is the exposure given to me for getting a job in the private sector. The college is also providing the dcpd department, which helps us to crack the job. Apart from that, we attend workshops and industries, which help us to see the practical work.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.

content.Placements: Excellent and good packages offered by the college, including placements with top recruiting companies for every particular courses and along with this, they offer good roles. Approximately 80% of students succeed in taking internship from the companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

admission_overview.title: CGC University Admission Overview 2026

The applications at the university are conducted in both online and offline modes.. CGC University offers over 100+ courses at UG and PG levels in streams, such as Animation, Law, Design etc. through its various institutes. CGC University offers full-time courses across various specialisations, such as Biotechnology and HR among others.

For Engineering courses, the exam is mandatory. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The basic eligibility is as below: The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular CGC University courses:

paragraphs: CGC University has a dedicated admission cell to assist the admission process. The objective of this cell is to guide potential students in making the selection from the different courses available at the university. Follow the steps forCGC University admission processgiven below:
Application Process
Interested students can register themselves at the CGC University website by submitting an application form. The form has to be submitted with required documents and an application fees.

The selection of a student for a particular course depends on the profile. Aspirants need to have a qualifying score in the minimum qualification required to be admitted to a course. Several aspects are taken into account to selecting a student, including:

Students are advised to check the information related to the respective to take admission. This can be done by purchasing the prospectus either online or offline. After initial registration, a student is required to pay the complete fee within one week of registration or one week after the announcement of final results. The seat of the student will be confirmed only after the complete fee has been deposited and the qualifying exam is cleared by the student. Information related to the commencement of classes and other details can be had from the admission cell or will be mailed individually.

Else, they can also pass High School Diploma and a three-year trade Diploma from the Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training in Chandigarh/ any State board of technical education/ Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering & Technology in Longowal.

faqs.question: Can I do BPharma from CGC University without Class 12?
faqs.answer: No, students who have not completed Cass 12 cannot pursue the CGC University DPharma course. The admission committee has set the criteria that only those candidates who have successfully passed Class 12 examinations with Science as the stream are eligible to apply. Other than this, students with any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India are also considered for admissions.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BSc programme at CGC University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc ranges fromINR 60,000 to INR 1.24 lakh.This happens because the fee varies as per the specialisation. Those who wish to know the exact fee for each specialisations can visit the official website of the institute.Note:The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidate who are looking for admission at CGC University can directly enrol for the respective course. The admissions is merit-based but for BTech and MBA programme, the university accept entrance exam such as JEE Main, CGCUET, etc. The students need to meet the last educational qualifications as per course requirement.

faqs.question: How can students join CGC University?
faqs.answer: CGC University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their past academic merit of Class 12 and graduation for UG and PG courses, respectively. Check below the step-wise CGC University admission process:Application Process:Apply for CGC University admissions in either offline or online mode.Selection Round:Admission to CGC University courses is both merit and entrance-based.Final Admission:After the completion of all the selection rounds, the selection candidates must pay a certain course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Are there any courses for which CGCUET is compulsory for scholarship and admission at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, CGC University accepts CGCUET exam to offer admission and scholarship. Given below arecourses for which CGCUET is compulsory for scholarship and admission:BTech CSE (Computer Science & Engineering)BTech CSE (Cyber Security)BTech CSE (Data Science)BTech CSE (Internet of Things & Cyber Security Including Blockchain Technology)BTech AI & ML (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)BTech AI & DS (Artificial intelligence & Data Science)BTech Robotics & AI (Artificial Intelligence)BTech Blockchain

faqs.question: What is CGC University cutoff for BTech for All India?
faqs.answer: Apart from JEE Main CGC University cutoff for BTech is based on PTU BTech as well. The institute offers two BTech specialisations based on PTU BTech scores followed by counselling. For cutpff 2022, the closing rank forB.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineeringstood at 1001 and forB.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Scienceit stood at1263for the General category All India candidates. The counselling ranks are released category-wise and round-wise. In 2023, the counselling was ended after Round 1 Seat Allotment. Tbaulated below is the closing rank for CGC University cutoff 2022 based on PTU BTech:Course2022B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering1001B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science1263

placement_report.college_name: CGC University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: CGC University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CGC University Mohali has introduced Capgemini CodeXperience Centre for all BTech CSE and ECE students . It is a Global Capability Centre established exclusively for Capgemini placements . Through this Centre, structured and industry-integrated learning facility is provided to students on campus.

It is Capgemini’s one and only lab in North India. It will provide training to students for placements and hire more than 500 students every year. The training is based on Capgemini’s own syllabus that is designed as per global-skill requirements. There is an opportunity for students to get hired by Capgemini and more than 10 other partner companies through this training program.

CGC University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The highest package offered stood at INR 1 Cr per annum . The student of the BTech CSE batch secured this package. 9 companies offered the package of INR 50 LPA to the batch 2025. More than 1005 recruiters visited the campus and placed 1361 students with good packages. The overall average salary secured by the batch 2025 was INR 6.34 LPA . The highest and average salaries offered to the MBA batch was INR 27 LPA and INR 9.5 LPA . The students of the BCA batch secured the highest salary of INR 33 LPA and the average salary of INR 9 LPA . The MCA batch secured the average salary of INR 10 LPA and the highest salary of INR 25 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of CG University in 2025 include Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.

faqs.question: Are government job offered to DPharma graduates from CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, completing DPharma from CGC University makes students eligible for various jobs in government departments and organisations. Moreover, some of these jobs may require graduates to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations, such as UPSC, SSC, etc. Find below the list of popular government job profiles for DPharma graduates: SBI Pharmacis ESIC Pharmacist MPSC Pharmacist OPSC Drug Inspector Railway (RRB) Pharmacist

outlook.description:
CGC University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, CGC University climbed 7 ranks to #112 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'BBA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, CGC University climbed 2 ranks to #52 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: CGC University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels are provided with the facilities such as air cooler in each room, arrangement for 24 hours uninterrupted power supply through govt, power supply, and college generators, internet connectivity through wi-fi system, hot water in winters and RO purified drinking water, facilities for indoor and outdoor games, 24 x 7 medical dispensary with ambulance etc, 24 hours security,laundry facility (optional on payment basis),tuck shops to cater to daily needs of the students,newspapers and magazines and a well-equipped gym in each hostel.

library.description: The institute has a computerized library with well-set equipment and modern day technology to encourage research activities and advanced reading. The library is stocked with numerous books authored by experts on the subject and subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional.The library subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional dailies to keep the students in touch with their fields of interest. The library is well furnished and can seat more than 100 students at a time in the spacious reading hall. The peaceful atmosphere in the library plays a major role in helping students concentrate and study better.  Apart from books, the library has a good collection of Audio video material, NPTEL, CDs & DVDs. The library has a separate “Book Bank” exclusively for the high flyers. Institute has E-Library and Journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis, Handball Ground, Track and Field Ground

It has been equipped with modern furniture and automatic cooking and storage facilities, which offers hot lunch, snacks, and beverages both to the students and staff at reasonable rates. It is well maintained with an efficient service and take away counter. It serves a variety of dishes at reasonable prices.
Institute has CGC Restaurant.

reviews.review_heading: Admission to the university is highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. T...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, AI-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.

reviews.review_heading: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good and supportive. Placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best in the surrounding area. The college has separate buildings for separate departments, and each building has more than 10 blocks. Apart from that, classrooms are ventilated and spacious. However, we are facing some problems.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and still improving.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It has Wi-Fi facilities, and it is one of the best facilities for students. It helps us in our studies. There are games and entertainment. There is a digital app that gives us practical knowledge. Classrooms are ventilated, big, and spacious. Seats are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good teachers and understanding and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available and infrastructure is good, lab contains perfectly functioning computer systems. I live nearby, so I do not know about the hostel facilities.  It is decent. Despensory is present in the college for any medical issue.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. It is usually clean. Hostels are clean and very accommodating. Plenty of food places are available. There are sports grounds for games like football, basketball, etc. Sports that take place are always refreshing and amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Students get a balanced college experience at CGC University, Mohali.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University, Mohali is great and well maintained. Classrooms and labs are well equipped. Washrooms are properly cleaned, which makes the daily college life comfortable. Most of the facilities needed by the students are easily available. Hostel facilities are decent and safe. Basic amenities like water coolers, electricity, 24x7 Wi-Fi and security are available. The mess food is average but manageable. Overall, the hostel environment is good for studying and living. It fe...

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and I recommend it to my friends and juniors for enrollment.
reviews.review_text: Everything is very good. Food is tasty. Safety and security are provided. Four meals are provided daily. Food is on time without delay. Rooms are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Decent private university.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with a clean, modern campus. Classrooms, labs, library, hostels, Wi-Fi, and sports facilities are well maintained. The campus environment is lively and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is very good, safe, secure, and educational institution.
reviews.review_text: The library in our college is very big and spacious and it is well-ventilated. There are more than 5000 physical books available, and digital libraries also level a part from that. There is a day and night facility for Wi-Fi but sometimes it goes very slow due to the use of students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placement, and enjoyable campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure for our course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with projectors. Labs are well maintained with updated systems and required software. Campus Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average at times. Library is large, well organized, and has sufficient books and digital resources for students.

reviews.review_heading: It provides better career opportunities with overall development from sports to practical skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a smart classroom with Wi-Fi available to us by the university, and our department provides us with labs that have proper software to work with. We also have a library where we can get every type of book, as well as an online facility.

Some of the popular streams include Engineering, Management, Law, Commerce, Computer Application, Journalism, Pharmacy, and Science at CGC University. Eligible students have the opportunity to benefit from 100% scholarships, amounting to a total tuition fee waiver of up to INR 50 Crore. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall good college with supportive faculty, good campus life. Sports facilities aren't great.

content.Placements: I'm in the Computer Science and Engineering branch. The placement scenario is overall great. Around 80-85% students are placed. The highest package is of 57 LPA, which is offered by Google. Other companies like Wipro, Microsoft, Amazon, and Infosys also come. Our branch has an average package of 7-9 LPA. Internship opportunities are not provided much by our college, and you will have to seek them on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is good, and it has one of the biggest campuses in Bangalore, but the hostel is overpriced. Coming to food, the mess isn't that good, and the quality doesn't match the price we are paying. Labs are conducted every week and have Ethernet LAN connections. The college library is good and has Wi-Fi as well, so you can come and study anytime. Borrowing books from there requires a card.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, but I wanted some more good infrastructure.

content.Placements: More than 45 percent of students get placed every year. The highest package offered is 60 LPA, and the lowest package is 25 LPA. Many students get placed at a good price. The top recruiting companies for our course are Bharat Electronics, Bosch, ABB, Google, etc. More than 25 percent of students got internships, which is not accurate, and it may be more or less. The top roles offered are manager and CEO of a startup. We can also start to create our own business in the non-IT field.

Some classrooms are in very bad conditions, but nowadays, they are working on problems and sorting them out. I do not stay in a hostel, but a few of my friends say that's good compared to any other college. There are two hotels in our college, one is the NRI hostel, which has a good infrastructure and good room space, but the con is that they don't have proper food facilities. The other is an Indian hostel, which has good food and is well-maintained.

admission_overview.title: DSCE Bangalore Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering offers three courses, namely a Bachelor of Engineering (BE), Master of Technology (MTech), Master of Business Administration (MBA), Master of Computer Applications (MCA), PhD, and MSc (Research). The college offers entrance exam-based admission to all the courses. Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in Engineering, Basic Science, and Humanities. The mode of application at the institute is online. Admission to various courses is entrance exam. In the Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE) undergraduate (UG) system of admission, those seeking entry must first appear in an entrance test such as KCET, COMEDK UGET, or JEE (non-Karnataka applicants), then undergo a merit ranking, according to the results of such tests, and must have completed the class 12 qualification with Physics and Mathematics as mandatory subjects. These entrance tests are merit based and the admissions may be management quota based.

eligibility_selection.title: DSCE Bangalore Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering offers five courses which include BE, MTech, MBA, MCA, and PhD/MSc research. The DSCE admissions are decided on entrance basis with each course offered requiring candidates to appear for a specific entrance exam. The eligibility criteria for each of the aforementioned courses at DSCE has been mentioned below: Class 12 or equivalent with 45% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biology/ Computer Science/ Electronics as compulsory subjects

MCA at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering requires candidate to have completed any undergraduate course from a recognised institute with a minimum aggregate of 50%. The Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering MCA admissions are entrance-based where candidates are required to appear for the KCET or Karnataka PGCET entrance exam.

courses_data.name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, KMAT, Karnataka PGCET, CAT, KCET
courses_data.description: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE) offers an MBA course at the PG level. The programme features a dual specialisation within the Department of Management Studies. The duration of this course is two years, which is divided into four semesters. The maximum duration to complete this programme is four years. Offered in 8 specialisations, the MBA course is affiliated with VTU and is approved by the University Grant Commission (UGC) and All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

faqs.question: How can candidates pay the tuition fee for the MBA programme at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The cost of the MBA tuition at DSCE can be directly paid to Bangalore in favour of Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering via a Demand Draft. Candidates have to furnish scanned soft copies of the following documents on the application platform - PG entrance scorecard, marksheets, and a passport-size photograph. It is advisable that the soft copies are in PDF format -- 1MB for documents, 500 kb for the photograph -- for hassle-free submission of the application.

faqs.question: Can I get Dayananda Sagar College Of Engineering at 500 percentile?
faqs.answer: It is difficult to get Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering for MBA admission at 500 percentile. Thecutoff list as per round 2 reveals that for the General AI category candidates, the cutoff was closed at 434. For OBC AI category candidates also, the cutoff was closed at 434.

faqs.question: How to get seat in Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Candidates must appear for entrance tests/Common Entrance Test conducted by the Karnataka Government and Consortium of Medical, Engineering, and Dental Colleges of Karnataka to get admission to undergraduate courses at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering. Admission to the institution is strictly based on the ranking they obtained in these entrance tests; that is, students with higher ranks were considered first.

faqs.question: What is the last date to fill KCET application form?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply was February 27, 2026. Candidates could fill out the KCET application form atcetonline.karnataka.gov.in.

description: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering offers various UG and PG courses in the streams of Engineering, Basic Science, and Humanities. Dayananda Sagar MBA PGCET cutoff is based on Karnataka PGCET score. Also, the institute offers BTech courses through various entrance exams. Aspirants of Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Admissions 2024 can refer to the table below to check out the top offered courses along with the selection criteria:

Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 803 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 1118 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 803 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 434, while in 2023, it was 787.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6584 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 5430, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 7819 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 18974. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

hostel_campus.college_name: DSCE Bangalore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college with supportive faculty, good campus life. Sports facilities aren't great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good, and it has one of the biggest campuses in Bangalore, but the hostel is overpriced. Coming to food, the mess isn't that good, and the quality doesn't match the price we are paying. Labs are conducted every week and have Ethernet LAN connections. The college library is good and has Wi-Fi as well, so you can come and study anytime. Borrowing books from there requires a card.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, but I wanted some more good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is old, and it's a very old building. Some classrooms are in very bad conditions, but nowadays, they are working on problems and sorting them out. I do not stay in a hostel, but a few of my friends say that's good compared to any other college. There are two hotels in our college, one is the NRI hostel, which has a good infrastructure and good room space, but the con is that they don't have proper food facilities. The other is an Indian hostel, which has g...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are decent. I do not go to a hostel because I am a day scholar, college infrastructure is good and well maintained. Rules are strict though. A hostel is available for males and females. Mess food when heard by students its bad just average, classrooms are decent below average.

reviews.review_heading: It's good for CSE, I would say, and if you need a good campus life, then also it's good to join.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is really good, and the infrastructure is also good. It has all facilities like labs, Wi-Fi, canteen, and on-campus hostel. The food in the mess is not good, as I have heard, that the food in the canteen, is the food good;, it's like average. Some dishes are good, and some are not.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dayanand Sagar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs are well-equipped with instruments and machinery. There are modern computer labs. VLSI lab is also present. Hostel quality is also good. All essential facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing due to its extracurricular activities and amazing coding clubs at a high rate.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It is just like a new techno park. The hostel food and living are also good. It feels more like home to me. The hostel timings are quite amazing on the campus. Hostel guards are quite friendly and helpful to everyone.

reviews.review_heading: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: In Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering, they have good facilities, and all courses are available. The hostel infrastructure is good, and food is provided in the hostel mess. The fee for the hostel is around Rs. 2,00,000. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an old college and good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good at the same college, too. They conduct games between courses and also provide gifts for winning. Conducted games like cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, choo-choo, and throw ball. They have commitments to conduct events, functions, etc.

reviews.review_heading: COMEDK people will not be satisfied because they pay a high fee.
reviews.review_text: I can say that classrooms infrastructure is average. Labs are good with AC facility. Coming to hostel, I want to give minus (the worst) but they collect more fees that too it is also in the name of trust. Food is also not upto to the fee we pay. I only stayed there for one year and shifted to PG.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing. It has a good campus and good placements. Everything is amazing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our college has labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, and digital boards. The quality of faculty in my hostel is very good. The food is amazing. It has a hospital on the campus. Every kind of sport and game is available.

reviews.review_heading: Finally, I conclude it is worth to join.
reviews.review_text: We have good campus with a big garden. I like a hill we have to climb a hill daily. If you want to join our college, we have a rock garden. Good sophisticated library with all facilities, a wide variety of books from school to master's degree, all of them in a bite.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college, good placements in ECE department, and fee is little bit higher side.
reviews.review_text: Labs in ECE blocks are well-equipped with all the required instruments, classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated. DSCE campus has two hostels NRI and Indian hostels. Food is served four times a day with well-maintained hygiene in mess. Library of DSCE is one of the biggest libraries in Bangalore. All books are available for your interest. Sports and gym facilities are there at the college.

reviews.review_heading: All about Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very old and not well maintained for the fee they are collecting from students. It is old and not worth the whooping fee of 180,000 per year. The food is also very bad according to my friends who stay there. It is better to choose a PG near the campus, as they are cheaper and student-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied a lot because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs have old equipment. Some don't work properly. Even the computers are out of date. Some classrooms don't have proper ventilation. Fans though present, don't work that well. Hostel is quite expensive so many prefer staying in PGs. Hostel Food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: It's a good infrastructure with all the facilities like smart classes. All the equipments in labs are available. It is not a big college. It has only 28 acres of land. You will get many food shops nearby but you won't get any sports opportunities here. There is only one ground.

data.description: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering has a huge campus of 7 acres with state-of-the-art infrastructure and provides modern facilities to students. The university is equipped with well-equipped classrooms and provides facilities like labs, library, transport, cafeteria, medial rooms, and others.

Placement opportunities are really the best if this college, especially for branches like CSE ISE and ECE.

reviews_list.review_title: Average campus. Placements are excellent for technology & core branches, but average for CS and IT.

review_content.Placements: The placement for core and technology branches is excellent. No college of this rank can compete with it. This college is a savior for students with ranks below 60,000- 65,000. For CS/IT, the placement is average. If you are in the top 50%–60% of your class, you will get a minimum placement of 8–9 LPA, a maximum of 18 LPA or more, and the lowest around 3–6 LPA. Most students get jobs as the placement rate is above 90%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Currently, IT does not have its own department. First-year classes are held in the lecture hall complex. While second- and third-year classes are in the main building. Classroom infrastructure is average, with some air-conditioned rooms. Fourth-year classes are held in the Computer Science department, whose infrastructure is below average. A new extension for the CS department is being built, which will also accommodate IT students. Overall, the college infrastructure is average, similar to most state government universities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My hbtu 3 years journey.

review_content.Placements: In my batch there are 80 students and almost all my senior classes have the same strength. Almost 90 percent students got placed and the package in my branch is around 11 LPA and the internship opportunities are very limited for CSE and Information Technology students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The boys hostel is not too satisfying in terms of cleaning and the infrastructure is also not too good but the greenery is good in the college. The campus is too big and the boys hostel provides very limited restriction so students can do many extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The college is decent best.

review_content.Placements: The core jobs are not very high because, if you are someone wanting to work in the core field, that will be quite difficult, as the company pattern shows that they hire more students from M.Tech. But if you learn coding through the four years of B.Tech, then the chances for placements are quite high, as you would have the choice of going to the IT sector and other software jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: HBTU has two campuses: East Campus and West Campus. The East Campus has two boys’ hostels for first-year students and a girls’ hostel for each year. The West Campus has hostels only for boys of 2nd, 3rd, and final year, Shatabdi Bhavan for cultural events, a cricket ground, a gymnasium, and other facilities. However, the condition of the hostel rooms is not of a very high standard. The hostels accommodate single, double, and three-seater rooms.
