review_summary.college_name: HBTU Kanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Technology (Oil Technology) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Oil Technology don't include mineral oils and gases in HBTU.

content.Placements: HBTU holds a 100 percent placement record in the oil branch, with many of the students receiving more than one offer. The highest placement this year is 14 LPA, with an average package of 8 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies include Ruchi Soya (under Patanjali), ExxonMobil, Reliance, and others. Almost 30 percent of the students in the 3rd year got internships, and almost 20 percent from the 2nd year in 2025. Apart from this, students from the 3rd and 4th years also perform research in the field of oil. The roles of oil technologists are offered.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is very good and has a powerful alumni network.

content.Placements: As of 2025, 59 students were eligible out of which 56 got placed in my branch in mechanical engineering. Placement percentage is 107%. Top recruitment companies are Samsung Electronics and TCS which often pick students in bulk. Almost 70% of students got internships from the campus.
content.Infrastructure: As we know, the college is very old thus the infrastructure is also very old but it gives chills too. The hostel is in bad condition. The mess food is below average for the first-year students. Water quality is bad as of now. Wi-Fi is available, which gives 8 GB per student per day but it is very slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average campus. Placements are excellent for technology & core branches, but average for CS and IT.

content.Placements: The placement for core and technology branches is excellent. No college of this rank can compete with it. This college is a savior for students with ranks below 60,000- 65,000. For CS/IT, the placement is average. If you are in the top 50%–60% of your class, you will get a minimum placement of 8–9 LPA, a maximum of 18 LPA or more, and the lowest around 3–6 LPA. Most students get jobs as the placement rate is above 90%.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, IT does not have its own department. First-year classes are held in the lecture hall complex. While second- and third-year classes are in the main building. Classroom infrastructure is average, with some air-conditioned rooms. Fourth-year classes are held in the Computer Science department, whose infrastructure is below average. A new extension for the CS department is being built, which will also accommodate IT students. Overall, the college infrastructure is average, similar to most state government universities.

individual_reviews.title: My hbtu 3 years journey.

admission_overview.college_name: HBTU Kanpur Course Admission 2025: Last Date, Eligibility, Fees, Selection Criteria & Dates

paragraphs: HBTU Kanpur admissionis primarily entrance-based and it accepts nationa-level entrance exams.Harcourt Butler Technical Universityoffers over 46 courses in UG, PG and PhD levels.HBTU Kanpuroffers courses throughSchool of Engineering, School of Chemical Technology, School of Basic and Applied Sciences, School of Entrepreneurship & Management and School of Humanities and Social Sciences. You can read on to know aboutHBTU Kanpur courses, admission criteria, fees, etc.

Candidates need to check the HBTU admission process filling out the application form as seat allotment is carried out by the selection criteria. The table below mentions the eligibility and selection details:
Common Eligibility
Selection Process
Class 12 withPhysicsand Mathematics as compulsory subjects along withChemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Computer Science with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD)
JEE Main/ CUET (for Biotechnology) + Counselling
Bachelor's degree in Mathematics/ Statistics/ Engineering/ Technology or having a BCA degree with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ST/PwD/OBC-NCL category)
NIMCET/ CUET-PG + Counselling
Bachelor's degree with Mathematics/ Statistics/ Engineering/ Technology or BBA/ Computer Applications with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD category)
CAT/CUET-PG+ GD + PI
BSc or equivalent degree with required aggregate
IIT JAM/ CUET-PG
BE/BTech degree in relevant specialisation with required aggregate
GATE/ CUET-PG
Master's degree in the relevant subject
UGC NET/CSIR NET
Class 12 or equivalent exam pass with at least 60% aggregate (55% for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwD)

There are multiple components included in theHBTU fee structuresuch as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time fees. The fee varies from one course to another. HBTU reserves the right to revise the course fee structure. Tabulated below is the course-wiseHBTU Kanpur feeand average package:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is as per the information curated from various sources. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

At the time of counselling, students are admitted to the applied course following the sanctioned seat intake. The university may have seats reserved for candidates belonging to SC, ST, and EWS categories. Tabulated below is theHBTU seat intakefor the offered courses:
NOTE:The above-mentioned seat intake is as per the information curated from various sources. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Harcourt Butler Technical University course admissionsare entrance-based and you are required to have valid score in the accepted examination to get a seat. More details regarding the same are mentioned below:
HBTU Kanpur Application Process

The university accepts applications via online mode. Those fulfilling the course-specific eligibility criteria can visithbtu.ac.into apply. Moreover, for the entrance, you have to apply through the website of the conducting bodies.
Release of Cutoff List & Shortlisting of Students

After the conclusion of the application procedure, the cutoff list is released by the university. The cutoff list mentions the minimum score required in the accepted exam for a candidate to become eligible for selection.HBTU Kanpur cutofflist is released till all the seats are allotted successfully. The university selects candidates based on their entrance-exam scores. HBTU accepts CUET-UG, CUET-PG, CAT, JEE Main, GATE, etc. for admission to specific programmes.
Counselling

In the last step,HBTU Counsellingis conducted for each of the courses. During this round, document verification and fee payment process are carried out. After the admission fee payment, the candidate is successfully enrolled and the seat is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is BTech (Lateral) course offered by HBTU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Harcourt Butler Technical University offerBTech (lateral) programmes. These are three-year courses, wherein students get admission directly in the second-year of the course. To be eligible for BTech (Lateral) course admission, aspirant must fulfil the eligibility requirements.  For BTech Lateral Entry, aspirants need to pass CUET exam and should have a three-year Engineering Diploma with a minimum of60% aggregate.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at HBTU Kanpur?

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA in HBTU?
faqs.answer: HBTU Kanpur carries out MBA admission procedure in three phases. In the first phase, applicants with a validCAT or CUET-PGscores are shortlisted and called for group discussion and personal interview (GD & PI) round. In the second phase, candidates with a score ofCMAT/AIMA-MAT/CUET-PGare called for GD & PI. If the seats are left vacant after the two phases, then the university conducts an entrance examination to fill out the vacant seats. The below-mentioned infographic presents weightage of eac

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of HBTU for an OBC candidate?
faqs.answer: HBTU JEE Main cutoff 2024 was concluded for BTech admission. For the OBC category, the JEE Main closing cutoffs ranged between38255and107282, whereinB.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineeringhas the most competitive rank38255. Candidates not eligible for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering can also choose less competitive BTech branches based on their ranks to improve their chances of getting a seat at HBTU.

faqs.question: Is HBTU good for MCA?
faqs.answer: The university faciliate placement support to the graduates. HBTU has not released course-wise placement report as of now. faqs.question: What is the selection process for HBTU MCA course?
faqs.answer: Admissions to HBTU Kanpur MCA course is done on the basis of merit in National Institute of Technology Master of Computer Applications Common Entrance Test (NIMCET) or CUET-PG. Hence, the seat allotment process is carried out based on the applicants NIMCET rank. To take this test, candidates need to register online on its official website. Moreover, candidates also need to register on the university official website for this course and submit the application successfully by paying the fee.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get HBTU?
faqs.answer: To get admission to HBTU for BTech specialisations, candidate must attain the neccessary rank in JEE Main. The last round closing ranks for JEE Main were between the range of38255and89966, whereinB.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineeringremaining the first choice among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI category candidates, the last round closing ranks varied between65864and143891, whereinB.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineeringhas the most competitive rank.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MCA in HBTU?
faqs.answer: Candidates with a valid Bachelor's degree in Mathematics/Statistics/Engineering/Technology or having a BCA degree with a minimum of 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ST/PwD/OBC-NCL category) from a university recognised by UGC are eligible to apply. Applications of only the eligible candidates are acceptable. Moreover, applicants must hold the mark sheets and other documents during form filling and admission confirmation.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered by HBTU, Kanpur?
faqs.answer: Harcourt Butler Technical University provides 50+ courses across six streams at undergraduate, postgraduate and PhD levels. These courses are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA). The admissions to UG, PG, and PhD courses, namely MCA, MTech, MBA, BTech, PhD, and MSc are based on the entrance exam. All the courses at HBTU are offered under its five schools, namely the School of Engineering, School of Chemical Technology, School of Basic and Applied Sciences, School of Enterpreneurship and Management and School of Humanities and Social Sciences.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at HBTU Kanpur?
faqs.answer: HBTU Kanpur offers admission to most of the programmes based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The university accepts scores in NIMCET, CUET, CAT, GATE, CUET-PG, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Aspirants also need to pass the GDPI round for MBA admission. Hence, direct admission is usually not possible at HBTU Kanpur.

description: HBTU cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech courses. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the HBTU JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

HBTU cutoff 2025 was released via HBTU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 11799 and 92684 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 11799, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 11799.

For the OBC category students, the JEE Main last round closing ranks varied between 42488 and 115657 for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. Of all the BTech specialisations, the most competitive was B.E. / B.Tech. was the easiest grab for students with a least
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Harcourt Butler Technical University Kanpur accepts CUET UG scores for admission to a list of undergraduate courses, including BBA. In 2023, a total of three rounds were released for CUET. As per the HBTU BBA cutoff 2023, the last round score was 51 for the General Home State quota. Candidates can use the filters below to check out the BBA course's HBTU round, year and category-wise cutoff 2023.
NIMCET 2024 last-round cutoff for MCA admission was 52 for the General AI quota.
For the OBC category, the NIMCET last round closing rank stood at 109 for admission to the course under the AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

hostel_campus.college_name: HBTU Kanpur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Oil Technology don't include mineral oils and gases in HBTU.
reviews.review_text: The college is equipped with Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a vast library that has books that are almost 100 years old to the latest journals, research papers, and e-books. For oil, there are 3 labs (one for UG, one for PG, and one for advanced research and Ph.D.). The lab has some of the most advanced equipment in the field of oil, and even samples from IIT come to HBTU for testing in the field of oil. The campus has an infirmary for any medical issues, where a doctor is available 7 days a week, an...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good and has a powerful alumni network.
reviews.review_text: As we know, the college is very old thus the infrastructure is also very old but it gives chills too. The hostel is in bad condition. The mess food is below average for the first-year students. Water quality is bad as of now. Wi-Fi is available, which gives 8 GB per student per day but it is very slow.

reviews.review_heading: Average campus. Placements are excellent for technology & core branches, but average for CS and IT.
reviews.review_text: Currently, IT does not have its own department. First-year classes are held in the lecture hall complex. While second- and third-year classes are in the main building. Classroom infrastructure is average, with some air-conditioned rooms. Fourth-year classes are held in the Computer Science department, whose infrastructure is below average. A new extension for the CS department is being built, which will also accommodate IT students. Overall, the college infrastructure is average, similar to most...

reviews.review_heading: My hbtu 3  years journey.
reviews.review_text: The boys hostel is not too satisfying in terms of cleaning and the infrastructure is also not too good but the greenery is good in the college. The campus is too big and the boys hostel provides very limited restriction so students can do many extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent best.
reviews.review_text: HBTU has two campuses: East Campus and West Campus. The East Campus has two boys’ hostels for first-year students and a girls’ hostel for each year. The West Campus has hostels only for boys of 2nd, 3rd, and final year, Shatabdi Bhavan for cultural events, a cricket ground, a gymnasium, and other facilities. However, the condition of the hostel rooms is not of a very high standard. The hostels accommodate single, double, and three-seater rooms.

reviews.review_heading: The underrated college with a great scope of improvement and decent placement.
reviews.review_text: The classes are spacious and well-ventilated with ACs. The library is huge, with over 1 lakh books. HBTU also has multiple canteens across the campus, offering plenty of spots to explore and hang out, making the overall campus experience lively and enjoyable.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in academics and also in extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are so good, while the campus is fine, and libraries are so good. About 1 lakh books are available in the college, which is a good facility in the hostel, and the seniors are very supportive in the college, so the academics are going smoothly.

reviews.review_heading: Good college like in placements, course, alumni network.
reviews.review_text: The campus life is not that much good as compared to other colleges, and the location of the college is also a negative side. Hostel life is good until unless you are in East campus (where all the academic and administrative buildings are present). According to me, it’s better to take private hostel than choosing West campus hostel like Ambedkar and Aryabhatt in 1st year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely worthy to join this college as it has a nice network.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good and present all over campus. Food is good, and we can decide the menu by talking to our mess secretary. We can also add or subtract food items from the menu if people agree with us. The canteen is average, as we get normal things like samosas and parathas.

reviews.review_heading: Chemical/CT at HBTU is worth it, strong academics and consistently solid placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is decent but mostly old. Buildings are functional, not modern. Labs are mixed, some are updated, while some are outdated. The hostel is basic with average maintenance; rooms are simple, and the mess food is consistent. Overall, it is a workable environment, but don’t expect premium facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Uttar Pradesh after the IIT.
reviews.review_text: There are several facilities in the hostels. There are separate hostels for girls and boys, in which facilities of mess and very variety of food and cultural diversity are also seen. Many students in Kanpur are from Kanpur itself as it offers a very good rate of interest to students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HBTU (one of the top state universities).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my department is quite old and needs renovation. Wi-Fi is available with good speed throughout the campus. If I talk about the library, it is well-maintained and you can get almost all books and journals from here. The quality of rooms in the hostel is average, and you'll get double and triply seated rooms in 1st,  2nd and 3rd year, while in the final year, you will get a personal single room for sure. The quality of the mess food is average, but it degrades as time passes.

reviews.review_heading: HBTU is a decent college with a long history and also good recognition in Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Library in HBTU is very nice. Fully air-conditioned and have the best infrastructure. But the infrastructure of hostels on the East Campus is old. It needs yearly maintenance however, the West campus is a perfect example of good infrastructure. There are several auditoriums in college and multiple grounds for sports and physical activities.

reviews.review_heading: Choose this college if you are not getting good NITs and you are ready for the grind.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs and library are available, classrooms are average. Hostel is also average with all basic facilities, a mess, laundry, canteen, and basic equipments for sports. Infrastructure of both departmental and hostel building is average. Medical facilities are provided by a dispensary in college. Students also receive insurance cover from college supported by a company.

reviews.review_heading: Our infrastructure is improving day by day. Faculty members are really nice and help us.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure gets enhanced by our faculty members according to the requirements as new labs are designed for us to get into it deeper and understand the techniques used in biotechnology. We have a central library and classrooms with AC. Wi-Fi is provided all over the campus. My hostel is Vishwakarma, where facilities are really good. Canteen is also available for us. The quality of food is so good. On college campus medical facilities are also available.

data.description: Harcourt Butler Technical University, Kanpur offers modern amenities with state-of-the-art infrastructure to its students. The facilities of HBTU Kanpur include a central workshop, computer centre, central library, central store and purchase, multipurpose virtual studio, hostel facility, guest house, post office, gymnasium/sport, bank, auditorium/ canteen, health centre, incubation centre, maintenance, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Harcourt Butler Technical University, Kanpur

likes.text: Some of the top recruiters of HBTU are Google, Microsoft, Reliance Industries, Samsung Engineering, Global Logic, OYO, IBM, Optum and many others.
The placement cell is working very well, and many students get placed in world-class MNC's with a high salary package.

likes.text: This college provides very good infrastructure for classrooms, library, laboratory, internet laboratory, Wi-Fi, sports area, and immediate medical services.
Rooms are not too good as few hostel buildings are old but overall, you will get all the required facilities.

college_info.intro:
JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida popular programmes are BTech and MCA. It offers variety of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. The top recruiters of JSS Academy of Technical Education in the recent past include Amazon, Accenture, Google, HCL, IBM, Infosys, Samsung, etc. The JSS Noida has been ranked 201-300 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Engineering. Students can become software engineers, IT professionals, data scientists & technical consultants or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Joining JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida for BTech course is generally considered a decent option. Candidates must consider factors like infrastructure, faculty experience, hostel and mess facilities, curriculum, etc. while taking admission.
The academy offers these courses in the streams of Engineering, Computer Applications, and Management. JSS Noida also gives hostel facilities to students. Hence, students can study in the institute without any difficulties.

placements.overview:
JSS Academy of Technical Education has released placement details on website. More than 170 recruiters participated in recruitment process and presented over 900 offers to students. Top recruiters of JSS Academy of Technical Education in recent past include Amazon, Accenture, Google, HCL, IBM, Infosys, Samsung. JSS Noida has been ranked 201-300 by NIRF 2025 under category Engineering. JSS Noida is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. JSS Noida has achieved 87% placement rate in the academic year 2024-25. The students secured the highest package of INR 47 LPA.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is average. The highest package offered in CSE core is 45 to 50 LPA and the lowest package offered is 4 to 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Samsung, and Amazon. The internship ratio is 100 percent but it depends on students skills and interests.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are like a green campus and decent hostel including Wi-Fi, a classroom with projectors and a library. The quality of hostel food is moderate not too bad contains four meals and hostels also have medical support 24/7, including outdoor and indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Hoping for a better placement rate in JSS, good infrastructure, and focus on skills.

content.Placements: I recently enrolled in this college, and as I have heard before, 2022, its placement was so good, even in 2020, the highest package was 60 LPA at Google. But as of now, the placement condition is too bad. Big companies are not coming to recruit, the average is only 4 LPA-6 LPA. But I am hoping that in the Next 3-4 years, the placement ratio will improve, and even big companies can also recruit.
content.Infrastructure: For infrastructure, I would say neither is too good like IIT, NIT, IIMs infra, nor too bad like other tier-2 colleges. Hostel infrastructure is better both for boys and girls. Even though the capacity is low and the buildings are old, it is a better place for B.Tech students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Harsh reality of JSSATE Noida.

content.Placements: Around 20 to 30 percent of students are placed. As of now, the highest package is around 15 LPA and the lowest around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Accenture, Wipro, Deloitte, etc. There is no exact information about how many got internships from the course, but I guess very few, around 5 to 6, will be able to get paid internships, otherwise, most of them got unpaid internships.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are not well equipped like a typical government college. Hostels are decent; you will get both AC and non-AC rooms. Mess food is very bad, but I prefer the college hostel at least in the first year. This college is not for you if you love sports and games, no proper facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placement and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placement record in college is 87 percent of students gets placed in 2024-25. The highest package is 48 LPA and lowest package is 4 LPA, and the median package is 6 LPA-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and Wipro. Top roles offered by companies are data development and software development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is overall good. The labs are well. The library has AC, with good environment for studying. The hostel facility is okay. The bathrooms are not well furnished and mostly have construction issues. The food quality is okay, like other mess. The hygiene is properly maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good if you can work hard, it can bring you a good amount of opportunities.

content.Placements: Placements are average, not very good, but you can get enough opportunities if you can skill up yourself. According to the college placement cell, the recent batch has the highest package offer, which is 21 LPA, and the average package is approximately 6.5 LPA, which is quite average. But you can get opportunities to grab.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are above average. The infrastructure for CSE depth of 1st year is not good since there are no AC in classrooms, but some labs are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi speed is average, not up to the mark. The hostel is good, and the mess food is edible till now. The library is top class with good infrastructure, fully air-conditioned, and a wide range of books and newspapers are available.

admission_process.title: JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida,offers admission to candidates in various courses. The admission process is conducted both online and offline. Candidates must register themselves with the academy by filling out the application form. Further, are required to appear for an entrance exam, for their preferred course. Below is a detailed breakdown ofJSS Academy of Technical Education Noida admission process:
JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida Registration Process

Candidates must register themselves with the institute in order to apply for admission. This is the first step in the admission process. Application forms for all the courses are available online on the institute’s official website. If a candidate wants to apply offline, they can contact the admission office. The application form must be filled out carefully by the candidate before the last date.
JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida Selection Criteria

After or before successfully registering with the institute, the candidates are required to appear for an entrance exam. The entrance exams accepted by JSS Noida include- JEE Mains, and CUET, etc. Candidates must score the required aggregate and appear for the counselling process to take admission.
Counselling Process
Once the exams have been conducted, results are declared. Students must appear for counselling, depending on the chosen course.
Admission call and confirmation of seat
If students clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed. Students must report to the college with fees and required documents. To confirm the seat, candidates must pay theJSS Noida fees.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida?
faqs.answer: The admission for B.Tech in JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida has the following procedures. The candidate should have appeared for an entrance exam, JEE Main/ UPCET which is conducted annually for admission into JSS. Then he has to get a valid score and participate in UPTAC counseling for seat allotment before the rank, category, and branch preference (e.g. - 180 seats under Computer Science). Eligibility in this context means there should be at least 45% marks through valid 10+2 in Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry (40% in case of reserved categories). However, there is also an option for direct admission through management quota depending on availability and higher fee structure.

faqs.question: What all courses are offered by JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida?
faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida, enjoys the privilege of a large variety of courses offered. Undergraduates are offered BTech in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, and AI & ML. Postgraduate programs include MTech in Manufacturing Systems, MCA, and MBA. Aspiring researchers may also consider PhD programs offered.These fields cover universities in engineering, IT, management, and pharmaceutical sciences, which means they have various career prospects. Although offered by the institute, the courses relating to AKTU guarantee that a cohesive curriculum is attached to the different disciplines making it a diverse and flexible center of education.

faqs.question: Can I get into JSS Noida with 70% in class 12 via JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, with 70% in JEE Main, you can get into JSS Noida. Candidates must score 70% or more marks in the aggregate of the best of five subjects, including Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, and have a JEE Main Rank (Paper – 1) to be eligible for admission to JSS Noida. Additionally, there are relaxations in minimum marks requirements for different categories like OBC-NCL, SC, ST, differently-abled persons, and defense candidates.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida?
faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida has been rated 3.2 on placements on the basis of 544 reviews done by students. In JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida, 855 students were admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 961 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 505 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 300000 and 123 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 914 students were admitted, out of which 981 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 606 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 353000 and 143 students got selected for higher studies. In JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida, 1007 students were admitted in year 2017-18, out of which 1014 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 629 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 421000 and 156 students got selected for higher studies.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at JSS Academy of Technical Education?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, JSS Academy of Technical Education has an impressive review rating of 3.24 by 551 students.

faqs.question: Does JSS Academy of Technical Education have good placements?
faqs.answer: JSS Academy of Technical Education (JSSATE) has a decent record when it comes to placements. Around 60 to 70% of students are able to get placed. The average package offered stays between INR 8 and 10 LPA. There have been instances where the number of placements was affected by factors like a recession. Some reviews mention that all eligible students get placed, but there were challenges in certain years due to economic conditions. However, the college has seen students being recruited by top companies like Accenture, IBM, Mercedes-Benz, Infosys, and others, with some students securing high packages. Overall, while there may have been fluctuations in placement numbers, JSS Academy of Technical Education does offer opportunities for placements in reputed companies.

JSS Noida has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for JSS Noida indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, JSS Noida's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

Each room is provided with beds, wardrobes, study tables and chairs. Round-the-clock power back-up facility is available. Spacious dining rooms are also available.

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. Rooms are spacious, clean, airy and well maintained with common bathrooms and are available on multi-sharing basis. Each room is provided with beds, wardrobes, study tables and chairs. Round-the-clock power back-up facility is available. Spacious dining rooms are also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Volley Ball

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with a green campus and decent hostels, supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are like a green campus and decent hostel including Wi-Fi, a classroom with projectors and a library. The quality of hostel food is moderate not too bad contains four meals and hostels also have medical support 24/7, including outdoor and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Hoping for a better placement rate in JSS, good infrastructure, and focus on skills.
reviews.review_text: For infrastructure, I would say neither is too good like IIT, NIT, IIMs infra, nor too bad like other tier-2 colleges. Hostel infrastructure is better both for boys and girls. Even though the capacity is low and the buildings are old, it is a better place for B.Tech students.

reviews.review_heading: Harsh reality of JSSATE Noida.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not well equipped like a typical government college. Hostels are decent; you will get both AC and non-AC rooms. Mess food is very bad, but I prefer the college hostel at least in the first year. This college is not for you if you love sports and games, no proper facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placement and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good. The labs are well. The library has AC, with good environment for studying. The hostel facility is okay. The bathrooms are not well furnished and mostly have construction issues. The food quality is okay, like other mess. The hygiene is properly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College is good if you can work hard, it can bring you a good amount of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are above average. The infrastructure for CSE depth of 1st year is not good since there are no AC in classrooms, but some labs are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi speed is average, not up to the mark. The hostel is good, and the mess food is edible till now. The library is top class with good infrastructure, fully air-conditioned, and a wide range of books and newspapers are available.

reviews.review_heading: Ample facilities but infrastructure from inside is much desired.
reviews.review_text: From outside, it looks good, but inside, classes are a little shabby, and roads are well paved, with an abundance of parking spaces. You also get Wi-Fi for all students, great library access, and well-built labs. There are hostels with AC and without AC. The choice is yours and also depends on availability.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities, teachers, and everything.
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities of Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, and labs are available. There are the best hostels ever, with bigger rooms, Wi-Fi connection, and good food. They have 3 shared rooms and a single room, and have AC and non-AC rooms. They provide vegetarian food and snacks. They have a water cooler and a filter also.

reviews.review_heading: A complete review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is what makes it stand above the rest. It has top-notch hostel facilities and good and spacious classrooms. The infrastructure stands at the top of the list. In our hostels, we have both AC hostel (ISH) and non-AC hostel (BH). Both the hostels have quality rooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: On campus, hostels are available, including both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned options. Veg foods are served in the mess, while non-veg foods are not on the menu. Sports facilities are also available on campus, providing great opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with a good location advantage.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms do not have ACs or even smart boards. Teachers are using old-style blackboards The labs are fine and you can get Wi-Fi access for your laptop. The hostels are good with all the facilities, the mess food is also eatable and on some days, it could be great too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSS Academy of Technical Education.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate building for every course or department. Every department has its own library, labs, Wi-Fi, halls, and many classrooms. Hostel is good because you have a choice of rooms. You can choose a deluxe hostel room or a simple hostel room. But the food is average. There are many sports. You can play in your hostel as well as in college.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good and no disappointments.
reviews.review_text: There are very nice infrastructure in the college and good libraries are present where we get the articles to read nice books for pharmacy are provided. Sports events are done per year. The food canteen is very good with good hostel facilities and good mess food.

reviews.review_heading: College is overall good if you are a brilliant, but not for below-average students
reviews.review_text: Everything was good, but classrooms are not fully equipped as AC is not provided by the college. The library is good, and there is a motivating environment for study. Sports and canteen facilities are available, but medical facilities are not. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is an auditorium and transport services available.

reviews.review_heading: JSS’s honest truth with all its upsides and downsides, so don’t miss it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms aren’t air-conditioned and are really suffocating in the summer. But the library is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi is okay. The girls’ hostel is really good; it has both AC and non-AC rooms, the food is good and hygienic, and there are sports facilities. The labs have AC and are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: JSS, Noida is still relevant in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is below average and quality degrades in night food. Hostel life is good, with sufficient campus area for any sports. There are school-like classrooms with no AC and coolers, classes become bad in the summers, and decent infrastructure still needs improvement.

data.description: JSS Academy of Technical Education Noida provides separate, in campus hostel facilities for boys & girls, primarily for undergraduate students on a first come first served basis. Hostels feature furnished, triple sharing AC/non AC rooms,  24/7 power backup, security, Wi-Fi, and mess services serving average rated food.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JSS Academy of Technical Education, JSS Mahavidyapeetha, Noida

likes.text: Many companies recruit in our college some of them are Kronos, Adobe, TCS, Infosys, Extramarks, Byjus, Wipro, Exl, HCL, and many more.
Though the placement was good, many students were not satisfied with the selection criteria of the company as many companies preferred only those students, who have special skills.

highlights.summary: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology admissions 2025 are open. Interested candidates can apply for their desired courses by visiting the official website of the institute. A few more updates are as forllows:

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology are BTech, MTech, & MBA. The college has these programmes available for students at the UG (undergraduate) & PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 & 2 yrs, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. KIT Coimbatore courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. The college offers degree courses in full-time mode, with a focus on departments such as Aeronautics, Agriculture, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, etc. BTech & MTech students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Cognizant, Infosys, HCL, Reliance Communication, & others. fees_and_eligibility.overview:
KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology gives a wide range of programmes to students at the UG & PG levels. At the UG level, the college offers a BTech programme to students in various specialisations such as Aeronautical, Agriculture, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Biotechnology, etc.

At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA, MCA, & MTech. KIT programmes are given to students across several specialisations, including Applied Electronics, Power Systems Engineering, Engineering Design, VLSI Design, etc. In addition to this, the college also offers PhD programmes to students across several specialisations such as CSE, EEE, ECE, Chemistry, Mechanical, Physics, & Biotechnology. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college with a good placement. This college does not have much enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: Students with an attendance of over 80% are more likely to be placed. Based on my knowledge, the highest salary package for IT jobs is 12 lakhs per annum, while the highest for core branches is 6 lakhs per annum. The average salary package is around 4 lakhs per annum, and the lower packages tend to be lower than this. The top recruiters in the field include DAMS Agri Industries and JAIN Irrigation. Almost all students need to complete internships. The top role available is in farm machinery.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities such as labs that are somewhat average. Classrooms are average. The library is also average as compared to other departments. The hostel is so good and jolly. Mess food is above average and the canteen is okay. Medical facilities are not available inside the campus, if it's serious they will take to the KMCH sulur.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in 2025. But bad in infrastructure and mess food.

review_content.Placements: Literally 50% of the students are being placed. The remaining are not placed maybe because of their history of arrears or some other reason. The highest package is 52 LPA, and the lowest salary is 6 LPA to 9 LPA. Autodesk and Hashai are the top recruiting companies. Mostly 95% of students get internships because it is mandatory. So in the 3rd year, they somehow managed to get an intern. The rest of the students are being tried for it, and do something not sure about it. I am not sure about the roles they are placed maybe like software engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: To talk about facilities in the class. There are smart TVs and interactive sessions conducted most of the time. We have Wi-Fi all the time. Library is a good aesthetic place for pics. The overview may be good but not the others like hostel is not that good to say. But have both non-AC and AC hostels separately. Mess and canteen foods are sometimes horrible but it is good most of the time. Sports and games support from college is good enough to participate and go somewhere out for it.

faqs.answer: KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology – KIT offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Business Management, Computer Applications, and Engineering. The college offers a BTech programme to students for a fee ranging between INR 1.5 Lacs and INR 2 lakh.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fee for BTech at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: Kalaignar Karunanidhi Institute of Technology admission is offered in online mode and is entrance-based. To get online admission to KIT, candidates must check the official website of the college. Candidates seeking admission to various courses at KIT Coimbatore must qualify for either the university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as TANCET for MBA/PGDM and MCA programmes, and TNEA for BE/BTech programmes. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with 45% aggregate from a recognised board.
faqs.question: Q: What is the procedure to take BTech admission at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: Yes, KIT- KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology does offer MCA courses for the duration of two years, and is segregated into four semesters. The institute offers MCA courses with the affiliation of Anna University. Moreover, the institute offers several value-added courses with the MCA course, such as Digital & Social Media Marketing, Data Science & Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, Big Data Analytics, etc.
faqs.question: Q: Does KIT- KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology offers MBA course?

faqs.answer: To get a seat in an MCA course at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology, candidates are obliged to complete the primary eligibility criteria first, which requires applicants to complete their graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for the reserved category). Moreover, candidates must apply for the course through the official website of the college.The college releases the merit of shortlisted candidates according to their scores achieved in the entrance exam, followed by a counselling process. Further, candidates who got shortlisted can check their names and pay the required course fee to confirm their seat.

overview_faqs.question: Can Kalaignar Karunanidhi Institute of Technology - KIT be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Kalaignar Karunanidhi Institute of Technology is a renowned institution offering BTech, MTech, MBA/PGDM, and MCA to students. Candidates can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Business & Management Studies, Engineering, IT & Software. The institute was established in 2008 and is a private autonomous institute, located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. It was initiated by Vijayalakshmi Palanisamy Charitable Trust and strives to provide the best education in the field of Engineering and Technology globally. KIT is affiliated with the Anna University (AU) and is AICTE approved. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Kalaignar Karunanidhi Institute of Technology boasts an impressive review rating of 3.9 based on student feedback at Shiksha.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of KIT College in Coimbatore.

content.Placements: Placement opportunity at this college was very good. Students got various placement opportunities after completing their degree. Big companies will come and hire students, and offer them various packages of Rs 1 LPA, and some will start their own startups.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college was very good. Classrooms were ventilated, and washrooms were also clean. Classrooms were smart with whiteboards, and the college building was also very big. Campus of college was also big, and whole college was under the camera surveillance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2025 with high packages.

content.Placements: Students are placed for good package salary with the help of the better placement training provided. Companies like Zifo and Biocon provide job offers and also internships. While many graduates enter into core biotech roles, some pursue higher studies, and some transfer to IT/data science.
content.Infrastructure: The department has a well-equipped laboratory and classrooms also have smartboards and Wi-Fi. In the library, we can able to access to review many research papers. Hostel is very clean and more secure space designed for students. The food provided in the hostel is very good.

individual_reviews.title: It's a good college with a good placement. This college does not have much enjoyment.

content.Placements: Students with an attendance of over 80% are more likely to be placed. Based on my knowledge, the highest salary package for IT jobs is 12 lakhs per annum, while the highest for core branches is 6 lakhs per annum. The average salary package is around 4 lakhs per annum, and the lower packages tend to be lower than this. The top recruiters in the field include DAMS Agri Industries and JAIN Irrigation. Almost all students need to complete internships. The top role available is in farm machinery.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities such as labs that are somewhat average. Classrooms are average. The library is also average as compared to other departments. The hostel is so good and jolly. Mess food is above average and the canteen is okay. Medical facilities are not available inside the campus, if it's serious they will take to the KMCH sulur.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2025. But bad in infrastructure and mess food.

content.Placements: Literally 50% of the students are being placed. The remaining are not placed maybe because of their history of arrears or some other reason. The highest package is 52 LPA, and the lowest salary is 6 LPA to 9 LPA. Autodesk and Hashai are the top recruiting companies. Mostly 95% of students get internships because it is mandatory. So in the 3rd year, they somehow managed to get an intern. The rest of the students are being tried for it, and do something not sure about it. I am not sure about the roles they are placed maybe like software engineers.
content.Infrastructure: To talk about facilities in the class. There are smart TVs and interactive sessions conducted most of the time. We have Wi-Fi all the time. Library is a good aesthetic place for pics. The overview may be good but not the others like hostel is not that good to say. But have both non-AC and AC hostels separately. Mess and canteen foods are sometimes horrible but it is good most of the time. Sports and games support from college is good enough to participate and go somewhere out for it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 88% of students got placed in EEE. The highest package is 16 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included L&T, Siemens, ABB, and Tata Power. Nearly 80% of students got internships at NTPC, BHEL, and GE. Roles offered are design engineer, system engineer, and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: EEE has state-of-the-art labs, interactive classrooms, and seamless Wi-Fi access. The library is well-resourced. Hostels are spacious and secure. Food in the mess is okay with a decent variety. Medical help is available. Sports infrastructure is well-maintained and engaging.

admission_overview.college_name: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology Admission 2026: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology offers courses at UG and PG levels such as B.E./BTech, M.E., MBA and MCA. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. Students interested in applying to any courses at KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology must register for entrance exams and appear for the same. The college is affiliated with Anna University, However, the college follows the admission norms of Anna University for admission to all its courses. To know more information related to KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology admission 2026, go through the sections below:

eligibility_selection.title: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology admission 2026 is open. The college uses an online mode of application for all the courses. The college offers BTech/B.E., MBA, MCA, and M.E. at the UG and PG levels. Admission to B.E course is based on TNEA counselling, and for admission to MTech, MBA and MCA, the college accepts TANCET scores. faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility required to get admission into the MBA course at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology is that candidates must complete their graduation with an aggregate of at least 50% (45% for reserved category candidates). Additionally, for the selection process, applicants are required to appear for TANCET, followed by a counselling process. Further, the college also offers management quota seats.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility requirements for admission to MBA at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: To get admission to the MCA course at KIT- KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology, candidates must first follow the primary eligibility requirement. Then, candidates must have secured a valid score in the entrance exam. Lastly, candidates must perform decently in the counselling process. The college is affiliated with Anna University, and the university conducts a counselling process through TANCA (Tamil Nadu Common Admission).
faqs.question: How to get admission into MCA course at KIT- KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: At the time of registration for the MCA course at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology, candidates are required to attach some basic documents, such as a photograph, DOB certificate, etc. Further, at the time of document verification after counselling, candidates are required to submit several copies/ original documents. The names of some of the important documents are as follows:Class 10 mark sheet and passing certificateClass 12 mark sheet and passing certificateBachelor's degree Recent passport-size photographAadhar CardCaste Certificate (if applicable)
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to MCA course at KIT- KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility required to get admission into the MCA course at KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology is that candidates must complete their BCA/ Class 12 + bachelor's degree with Mathematics. Moreover, the applicant must have secured an aggregate of at least 50% (45% for reserved category candidates). Additionally, for the selection process, applicants are required to appear for TANCET, followed by a counselling process. Further, the college also offers management quota seats.

paragraphs: KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology admission processcontains various steps, such as filling out the application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and final seat confirmation. Check below the detailed steps of KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology admission 2026:
Step 1: KIT Application Process 2026

To be eligible for admission toB.E./BTech,candidates need to apply first on the official website of TNEA to fill out the TNEA counselling application from 2026. Further, candidates seeking admission to M.E.,MCAand MBA are required to fill out the TANCET application form for admission. Additionaly, after filling out all the criteria set by the college, candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to fill out the registration form.
Step 2: KIT Selection Round

KIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology admission is based on the entrance exam for all the courses. The college selects candidates for BTech-based TNEA Counselling and accepts TNCET exam scores for MTech, MCA and MBA courses.
Step 3: Final seat Confirmation
After candidates get selected, they must complete their enrollment by submitting the requiredKIT - KalaignarKarunanidhi Institute of Technology feewithin the given deadline to secure admission.

Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with 45% aggregate from a recognised board.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KIT College in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college was very good. Classrooms were ventilated, and washrooms were also clean. Classrooms were smart with whiteboards, and the college building was also very big. Campus of college was also big, and whole college was under the camera surveillance.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025 with high packages.
reviews.review_text: The department has a well-equipped laboratory and classrooms also have smartboards and Wi-Fi. In the library, we can able to access to review many research papers. Hostel is very clean and more secure space designed for students. The food provided in the hostel is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college with a good placement. This college does not have much enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities such as labs that are somewhat average. Classrooms are average. The library is also average as compared to other departments. The hostel is so good and jolly. Mess food is above average and the canteen is okay. Medical facilities are not available inside the campus, if it's serious they will take to the KMCH sulur.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025. But bad in infrastructure and mess food.
reviews.review_text: To talk about facilities in the class. There are smart TVs and interactive sessions conducted most of the time. We have Wi-Fi all the time. Library is a good aesthetic place for pics. The overview may be good but not the others like hostel is not that good to say. But have both non-AC and AC hostels separately. Mess and canteen foods are sometimes horrible but it is good most of the time. Sports and games support from college is good enough to participate and go somewhere out for it.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: EEE has state-of-the-art labs, interactive classrooms, and seamless Wi-Fi access. The library is well-resourced. Hostels are spacious and secure. Food in the mess is okay with a decent variety. Medical help is available. Sports infrastructure is well-maintained and engaging.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for placements. Other activities are very good. It is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is slow, and labs are maintained properly. Smart boards are available in classrooms. Other facilities are average at our college. It should improve the hostel food and add one more canteen. Sports and medical facilities are average in our college. Books are maintained properly in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: The college is the best and it has a good quality of the hostel. The quality of food is super. Sports and games are encouraged in this college. I recommend students join this college. The hostel has a separate gym, and it is under CCTV surveillance 24x7. The maintenance of the hostel is so disciplined.

reviews.review_heading: KIT is a good college that provides so many opportunities both academically and other activities.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is so good. Our campus is a Wi-Fi campus. Different labs are there to help in our education. There are so many opportunities for those who have good ideas and skills. Extracurricular activities are also encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is so good.
reviews.review_text: Auditorium is very big with AC and comfortable to see all the programs. Hostel is very neat and clean with AC, and also non-AC is available in this college. Classrooms are comfortable to study in and are also equipped with a smart board. The food is so tasty, tea, and snacks are amazing

reviews.review_heading: Amazing campus, great learning experiences, and good placement rate.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards projectors. Wi-Fi-high-speed internet is available across the campus and inside the hostel. There is a modern lab with upgraded equipment. There are clean and hygienic rooms with 24/7 water and power supply, and a separate hostel for boys and girls. The mess food is hygienic and has multiple options. Doctors are available. All types of sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: The review was carried out by a committee that has not been approved.
reviews.review_text: The campus has excellent infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and high-speed Wi-Fi facilities. Libraries are stocked with updated books, journals, and e-resources. Hostel facilities are also very good with clean rooms, 24/7 security, hygienic food in mess, and recreational areas provided.

reviews.review_heading: My college is worth it for placement.
reviews.review_text: The quality of hostel facilities can vary widely. Some hostels offer well-maintained rooms, study areas, Wi-Fi, and recreational space. Medical facilities in hostels are typically basic with first-aid kits and a nurse or doctor available for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, consisting of AC and non-AC accommodations, with good washrooms and drinking water. They even provide a gym facility and small vending machines, which help us at night whenever we feel hungry.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel offers room options with a common area, free Wi-Fi, and purified drinking water. Vegetarian and non-vegetarian food are available in the mess. The hostel facilities for boys and girls are excellent, with clean drinking water, a gym, and medical facilities. The classrooms have well-maintained high-speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: KIT - (First step towards a great Success).
reviews.review_text: The faculty are the backbone of the students' success, as they constantly guide students with upcoming and current technology and help them enhance their skills. Their support and the study pattern are really what it takes for students to achieve great heights in their lives. Wi-Fi, labs, and the classroom environment are very good and helpful. The hostel and canteen food and environment are good, with time to interact with other students from various branches.

data.description: The Kalaignar Karunanidhi Institute of Technology campus offers a wide range of amenities to cater to the needs of its students. The institute has state-of-the-art infrastructure which includes center of excellence, ultra-modern auditoriums, IIT B Remote Center, conference hall, etc. KIT Coimbatore campus spans across a vast area of over 11 acres, featuring five-story buildings that includes classrooms, laboratories, a library, and other facilities. The college campus is located at a distance of 12 kilometers from Coimbatore Railway Station and 8 kilometers from Coimbatore Civil Aerodrome. Additionally, the college also facilitates students with separate hostel facilities for boys and girls.

faqs.answer: A:    You need to get more than 95 percentile in JEE-mains. faqs.answer: BIT Sindri offers admission to BTech course through Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination (JCECE). The selection for M.Tech programme is based on GATE score of the aspirants. Besides, the institute conducts a written test/ interview to shortlist aspirants for PhD programmes. Hence, direct admission is not possible at BIT Sindri. Aspirants need to pass selection rounds to get a seat in the institute.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at BIT Sindri?

faqs.answer: Computer Science Engineering is one of the specialisations offered in BTech by BIT Sindri. It is one of the popular specialisations. Students pursuing BTech CSE from BIT can participate in the placement drive conducted by the institute. Birsa Institute of Technology (BIT) Sindri has concluded its placement process for its BTech batch passing out in 2024. As per the latest report, the the highest package and average package offered during placements in 2024 stood at INR 16.50 LPA and INR 7.57 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Q: Which exam is required for BIT Sindri?

faqs.answer: BIT Sindri admissions begin with registration. For MTech and PhD, candidates can fill out the application form on the official website of the institute. Candidates are shortlisted for BTech based on JEE Main score. Aspirants applying for BTech have to fill JEECE counselling form. Once the registration is done, aspirants need to appear for JEECE Counselling. GATE score is considered for admission to M.Tech programme. Aspirants applying for M.Tech can also appear for the entrance exam conducted by the institute. BIT conducts a written test for PhD admission.

For the General/EWS/BC-1/BC-2 category candidates, the JEECE application fee is INR 500. However, for SC/ST/Female candidates of all categories, the application fee is INR 250. Candidates will have to pay the application fee online i.e., through net banking/credit card/debit card. No other mode of application will be accepted.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am not dissatisfied with the faculty because the faculty in our college is very good.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package in our course is 16LPA, the lowest package offered is 4LPA and the average package in our course is 8LPA. The top recruitment companies in our course are L&T, JSW, Adani, etc. 50 percent of students get internship in our course in Adani JSPL L&T. The top roles in our course are designing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good in our department, such as Wi-Fi, a classroom, and a library. The quality of the hostel in our college is very good and the mess food is also good. Canteens are also available in our college, and the food in the canteen is also very good, such as aloo paratha.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for students for their overall development.

content.Placements: 60–70 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 16.5 LPA by Vedanta, and the lowest is 7–8 LPA by JSW. Top recruiters include Aditya Birla Group, JSW, Vedanta, etc. Till now, no one else. Vedanta is also in mining, so many students focused on the GATE exam because in mining, the syllabus is easier compared to other courses.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and libraries are average. Food quality is average but good. Hostel facilities are below average. Hostels are not maintained regularly. Upgradation is needed in this college, especially in labs, as many equipments are not working properly. They should upgrade them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has absolutely amazing faculty members and good placements.

content.Placements: 92.6 percent of students are approximately placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 18 LPA. The average package is 10 LPA. The lowest package is 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies in my course are Aditya Birla, Adani Power Plant, JSW, etc. 100 percent of students get internships in my course in companies like BCCL, NCL, CMPDI, etc. Roles offered in my course are manager, assistant manager, executive engineer, safety officer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, but labs, classrooms, and libraries are very good. All facilities in my hostel are good. The quality of food available in my mess and canteen is very nice and well-cooked. Medical facilities are okay. Sports and games are too good at my college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Value for money college, placements are good, and the campus is satisfactory.

content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students got placed in the previous batch. Many opted for on-campus placement, and some cracked GATE and are doing M.Tech/PSU. Some also went for off-campus placement. The highest package was around 15 LPA in my course, and the average is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Aditya Birla Group, Inox Aur Solutions and Reliance and many more cement companies. Around 90 percent of students got internships, but most were unpaid. Paid internships are hard to get. Many got paid internships in reliance and ABG. Companies generally offer us roles like a graduate engineering trainee or an engineer.

admission_overview.college_name: BIT Sindri Admission 2026: Eligibility, Selection Process, Application Form, Dates

admission_overview.title: BIT Sindri Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: BIT Sindri admissions are entrance-based. Admission to the flagship BTech course of BIT is through JEE Main scores. The institute conducts a written test/ interview for MTech programme. BIT Sindri also offers PhD programme at the doctoral level. The institute affiliated to Jharkhand University of Technology offers 10 BTech and five MTech programmes across 15 departments at UG and PG levels.

eligibility_selection.title: BIT Sindri Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: BIT Sindri offers UG, PG and PhD programmes. The duration of these programmes varies from course to course. Admission to all the courses is based on entrance exam. Candidates must also meet eligibility criteria to apply for a course. Check below BIT Sindri courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects as well as Chemistry or Biology as optional subjects with at least 45% aggregate
BE/ BTech or equivalent in respective discipline with a minimum of 60% aggregate or equivalent CGPA (55% aggregate for SC/ ST)
ME/ MTech or equivalent degree in respective discipline with a minimum of 60% aggregate or equivalent (55% aggregate for SC/ ST)

faqs.answer: BIT Sindri offers lateral entry in the BTech programme to Diploma holders in Engineering and Technology streams. The selection is based on score of the candidates in competitive examination conducted separately for them. The number of seats via lateral entry in all branches are 10% of the normal seats.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for BTech (lateral entry) at BIT Sindri?

faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed ME/ M.Tech or equivalent degree in respective discipline with at least 60% aggregate or equivalent CGPA (55% aggregate or equivalent CGPA for SC/ ST) from recognised university/ institute are eligible to apply for the PhD programme at BIT Sindri. Besides, candidates need to appear for written test/ interview conducted by the institute for admission to PhD programme.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for PhD at BIT Sindri?

faqs.answer: Yes, candidates need to have a valid GATE score for admission to MTech courses. Aspirants must also pass BE/ BTech or equivalent in respective discipline with at least 60% aggregate or equivalent CGPA (55% aggregate or equivalent CGPA for SC/ ST candidates) for admission in the MTech courses.
faqs.question: Is GATE compulsory at BIT Sindri?

paragraphs: BIT Sindri admission processincludes multiple steps. Student are offered admission via their entrance exam scores. Candidates can check below the steps to get a seat in the institute:
BIT Sindri Application Process 2026

Students have to fill JEECE application form to apply for counselling for BTech programme. For other courses, MTech and PhD, Students need to download the application form from the institute and submit it offline or apply online on the official website of the institute. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee to apply for the course.
Selection Process

Aspirants need to appear for JEE Main for BTech.GATEscore is considered for admission to MTech programme. Aspirants applying for MTech can also appear for the entrance exam conducted by the institute. BIT may also conduct a personal interview round for selected students. For PhD admission, aspirants need to appear for BIT written test followed by a personal interview round.
Merit List and Counselling

Once selected, BIT Sindri releases a merit list. Aspirants with their names in the merit list need to participate in counselling and document verification rounds. BTech students need to register forJEECE Counsellingfor seat allotment. Shortlisted students have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

BIT Sindri fee is a sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee and one-time fee. The components in the total fee vary with the course selected by the students. Check below the course-wiseBIT Sindri feesand median package:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

BIT Sindri seat intake varies course-wise. Students can get a seat in BTech programme based onJEE Mainscore whereas, for MTech, aspirants must have aGATEscore. Below is the course-wiseBIT Sindri seat intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
