description: GJUST cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at GJUST can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

GJUST cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 191768 and 1372644 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 191768, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 175209.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 191768.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

During the last round, GJUST B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 191768 and 1372644 for students in the General AI quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat for, with the cutoff rank being 191768 in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 114787, and in 2023, it was 188149. This pattern clearly suggests that the competition for this specialisation has saw fluctuation over the past thr

hostel.description: There are eight Hostels (three for boys, four for Girls and one for working women) which can accommodate about 2150 students provide all the residential, recreational, sports, academic, finical, informational and stationary facilities within a designated mini campus under the surveillance of closed circuit camera. The hostel provides all suitable facilities like wi-fi, T.V, gym, cyber lab, ambulance, sports, ATM, and more.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Handball Courts, Volleyball Courts, Athletic Track

facilities: Signal Processing and Signal Conditioning Lab
labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Central Instrumentation Lab, Research Lab, Biomedical Intrumentation Lab, Anatomy and Physiology Lab, Biochemistry Lab, Signal Processing and Signal Conditioning Lab, Histology and Clinical Sciences Lab, Medical Electronics and Project Lab, Hydrotherapy Lab, Electrodiagnostic Lab, Electrotherapy Lab

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are average, like infrastructure, campus life, crowd, teachers, and hostel.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library are good. There are all the facilities for a studious student who genuinely wants to study. But the hostel provided for B.Tech students is very bad. No space in the room, no separate almirah, table, chair, or even bed. The food is also very bad at this hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the infrastructure. The faculty is supportive and caring.
reviews.review_text: Benches in classrooms are bad and broken. Fans are not working properly. Hostels are average, and the food is average. The good thing about the college is that it has a very large sports complex, which has many indoor game courts and outdoor sports as well. There is a good library which is very large, and seats are available in very good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review from 2nd sem B.Tech E&C student.
reviews.review_text: The hostels of the university are in a way like, like you get a hostel in just 1st year, after that, there will be no hostels facility for students and still the hostels are not that good. 4 to5 students live in a single room and it becomes impossible for someone to study.

reviews.review_heading: GJU, Hisar, college life review.
reviews.review_text: There is very good infrastructure that helps us to learn easily. Very good classrooms and smart classes with Wi-Fi for each student are provided in the hostel. The food quality is not very good, but it has good medical facilities and a good sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: A great place for practical learning in printing & packaging.
reviews.review_text: The university has a large campus with greenery and well-maintained buildings. The printing department is equipped with modern labs, offset and flexographic printing machines, computer labs, and a good library. Wi-Fi is available, and classrooms are clean and spacious. Hostel facilities are good, rooms are maintained properly, and the mess food is average but hygienic. Sports facilities, medical centre, canteen and stationery shops are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Guru Jambheshwar University of Science and Technology is an overall good university.
reviews.review_text: Basically, there are 4 hostels. Each hostel has Wi-Fi, a canteen, a mess, and TV rooms. There are grounds for playing as well. There are study rooms that are as good as libraries. Medical facilities are also available, as the health center is not far from the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is very good in every field, with lots of greenery and best studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good on our campus, including fully AC labs for new ideas, coding practice, Chemistry lab, AutoCAD lab, and more. Hostels have luxurious rooms and clean washrooms. Mess food is average in hostels, and there are four hostels for girls and four hostels for boys.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is so well. Placement and crowd need to improve if a student is serious about them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is decent like we get separate Wi-Fi and pass so like you can do your basic work easily. Labs are well-equipped and fully running condition. Library is also AC equipped and fully running well cleaned and big. Quality of students is fine only, like for the first student who got the new hostel, else they will get the old wing that is just average. Quality of food varies to change our meals according to taste. Canteen is available. Medical facility is top notch but...

reviews.review_heading: GJU lifestyle of students.
reviews.review_text: Very neat and clean rooms. I like to spend time with my friends in these classrooms. We talk for hours sitting here, and we always miss this time when we all together sit here and talk to each other and make each other laugh. Sitting in canteen etc. I like it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Shekhawati Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 27 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good institute of the city.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities on the campus. And all the services provided by the college are the best. The college department is very gentle. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, Science lab, computer lab, playground, NCC, classroom, off-course, and a big library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by CRM Jat CollegeReviewed on 23 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in Haryana
reviews.review_text: My college facilities and infrastructure are very good, and the department is very neat and clean. The classroom is very big and the air facilities are very good. My college hostel facilities and infrastructure are very good, and the food quality is very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dayanand CollegeReviewed on 14 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is moderate with decent campus.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi at all. It is only available in computer labs and library. Labs are well furnished and equipped with all the required equipments and materials. Hostel facility is not available for boys but available for girls. There is only a first aid kit in medical facility terms. Sports and games are encouraged. We have dedicated ground and field for specific sports like cricket, football, tennis, handball, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by CRM Jat CollegeReviewed on 9 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities and infrastructure are good and the best. The department is very neat and clean. The rooms, labs, library, and classrooms and the hostel facilities are very good, and the food quality is very good. The mess, canteen, medical, and sports facilities are also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CRM Jat CollegeReviewed on 12 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Punjab and Haryana.
reviews.review_text: My college facility and infrastructure are very good and the best. Class, library, and labs are very great and air-free rooms, all rooms are neat and clean. My college hostel facilities are very good, and the food quality is very good. My college hostel mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games facilities are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of placement and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in this college is very good, but it is only the infrastructure, not the study or courses. There is no space in hostels for students, and there is no generator to support electricity after a cut. No one is interested in listening to your problems. You have to buy your light for the room.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good college for studies, excellent infrastructure, and also good placement in 2025.

review_content.Placements: Above 70% students were placed in my college. Highest package is 48 LPA in 2025, and lowest package is 3-5 LPA. In my course CSE (Cyber Security), currently, no companies are interested because all companies already have cyber analytics. Percentage doesn't matter at all, but you have no history of arrears and also have good coding skills to be placed. Top companies are Zoho, TCS, PayPal, etc. Data analysis and network analysis are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided all around the college. Also, good infrastructure for studies. Library is open till 6 pm. Hostels are good, and food is average. Quality of the facilities is good, and they also have good knowledge about the course they teach. In food court, food is good and affordable. Many games are available, like football, hockey, throwball, cricket, kabbadi, etc.

faqs.answer: Karpagam College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Karpagam college of engineering, Coimbatore.

content.Placements: The college provides good facilities. So far, we have recorded a 90% placement rate. Placement offers rely on students' interests. Our college students have been placed in top MNC companies, and IT companies thrive well in their respective fields.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is basically good, with greenery surrounding it. Every block is neat and clean. Every floor has water dispenser facilities. The classrooms have world-class infrastructure with smart facilities. The hostel rooms are located in a ventilated place, and the rooms are neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Placements are good and challenging college.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placed in my course. The highest salary package is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.8 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Amazon. Around 75 percent of students got internship. The top roles are product manager and financial manager.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure and facilities are good. The classrooms and labs are good. Many technical and financial books are available in the library. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. The hostel facilities are good. The food is good, and canteen is also available. The medical facilities are available.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided all around the college. Also, good infrastructure for studies. Library is open till 6 pm. Hostels are good, and food is average. content.Placements: Placements are average. Around 60% of students got placed. The highest package is decent, but the average is on the lower side. Few top companies visited. Internships are limited, mostly through personal efforts. Roles offered are not always core-related. Joining is not that much the best.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is only for the hostel. Labs are not impressed. Classrooms are not impressionable, and there are separate blocks for the library. The mess food is below average. We should go 2 kilometers from the college for medical facilities. Sports and games are available every semester, and cricket and other sports preferences are there, so students can go for it.

faqs.question: How can I get into Karpagam College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Karpagam College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irre

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Karpagam College of Engineering is up to 1506. Good thing to know is that Karpagam College of Engineering has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

hostel_campus.college_name: Karpagam College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Karpagam college of engineering, Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basically good, with greenery surrounding it. Every block is neat and clean. Every floor has water dispenser facilities. The classrooms have world-class infrastructure with smart facilities. The hostel rooms are located in a ventilated place, and the rooms are neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good and challenging college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good. The classrooms and labs are good. Many technical and financial books are available in the library. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. The hostel facilities are good. The food is good, and canteen is also available. The medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college for studies, excellent infrastructure, and also good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided all around the college. Also, good infrastructure for studies. Library is open till 6 pm. Hostels are good, and food is average. Quality of the facilities is good, and they also have good knowledge about the course they teach. In food court, food is good and affordable. Many games are available, like football, hockey, throwball, cricket, kabbadi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025, and a nice environment.
reviews.review_text: Labs are renovated, computers are updated, and systems are good. The library is equipped with good books and is easy to access. Mess and canteen food are manageable. Sports is really good, as many events were conducted during the time. Gym facilities are provided inside the campus with the required amount of equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college, and students can join it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only for the hostel. Labs are not impressed. Classrooms are not impressionable, and there are separate blocks for the library. The mess food is below average. We should go 2 kilometers from the college for medical facilities. Sports and games are available every semester, and cricket and other sports preferences are there, so students can go for it.

reviews.review_heading: Karpagam College of Engineering is absolutely the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Karpagam College of Engineering infrastructure facilities were excellent. More classrooms and good library were available at this college. This college had more mechanical, electrical and computer laboratories available at this college. This college management provided good hostel facilities for boys and girls. Variety of foods were available at this college mess and canteen. Medical and sports ground facilities were also there at this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements, affordable fees, a strict dress code, and hostel rules.
reviews.review_text: The hostel food is average, but the hostel rooms are quite good. Our college conducts a yearly sports meet for our campus students. Wi-Fi is available and free for laptops, especially for hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with experience as a fresher to 2025 passed out. It's a good college experience
reviews.review_text: A well-furnished and well-equipped domain is needed, and technical equipment is installed according to the department's laboratory needs. The food provided in the hostel seems to be under the rating at 7/10, it is not too bad, but not very good. The sports meets are conducted every year, encouraging students to participate in various game events.

reviews.review_heading: I have a good future because I have knowledge in the field.
reviews.review_text: My department laboratory has advanced equipment. On the college campus, all laptops are connected to college Wi-Fi. Classrooms have a projector and screens for teaching. There is average taste food in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: In simple words, Karpagam College is a good campus, but not for all.
reviews.review_text: Not all faculty teach well; a few professors may teach based on their own interests, but many of them work only for their salary. The infrastructure of the college is good, but not all areas are well-maintained, for example, the toilets, grounds, etc. They provide more support for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Karpagam College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available at every place, and college infrastructure would be simple and elegant. The food available will be good enough, and the quality is good, and moreover, there is only one cafeteria here, and medical facilities are so good since there is a big hospital in our college, which comes with a medical course.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is in our college. The facilities are good at our college. The classrooms are good. We have Wi-Fi connection, lab rooms, a big library, and medical facilities in front of our college. We have big playground. The hostel facilities are available. The canteen also available.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college is old, but the labs and library are fully equipped. The campus has Wi-Fi, classrooms with projectors and smartboards. The hostel is the same for all; there is no AC hostel, and the food is average. Both veg and non-veg menus are available. Medical support is near our college; the institution medical college is close to us. They support sports and take students to various tournaments if they have talent.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good placements and facilities provided to students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, a laboratory, and classroom facilities and infrastructure are very good. Good infrastructure helps students to learn peacefully. Hostel facilities are well-satisfied. The quality of the food is good and tasty. Maintenance is good. Overall, students are satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, facilities are helpful, and placements are above average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is one of the best. Wi-Fi is available all over the college, the lab facilities are good, and labs are neat. Students get full access to the library, and classrooms are well-equipped. Every class has a projector. Hostel infrastructure is good, with separate hostels for each year of students. However, mess food is below average. College has playgrounds for separate sports.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Karpagam College of Engineering

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Zoho, CTS, TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Avasoft, Mallow, Mahathi, Mind Tree, etc., visit our campus.
We had a very good placement training in our college which was more helpful for attending the drives of the companies.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and big crowd environment in this college.

review_content.Placements: 60 percent of students are placed from our course last year. The highest package is around 20 LPA (only 10 students got it), and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Most of the time, the top MNCs coming to our college are Wipro, Accenture, Infosys, TCS, and Tech Mahindra. Data analyst and software engineer are the best roles offered by our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good because the campus is very big, and this university is located in the middle of mountains. Hostel facilities are manageable. Sports and medical facilities are available. Labs and classrooms are really good and equipped with Wi-Fi. Mess food is not good, as we are investing a lot of money.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: There is more focus on theoretical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: There is too much competition in the CSE field at this university. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 1-2 LPA. Many students get placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 7-8 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS and Tech Mahindra. Many students get internships in new startups, and not in highly rated companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the departments is well-structured and well-maintained. Unlimited Wi-Fi access is available in all department buildings and the library. In the hostel, Wi-Fi usage is restricted to only 2 GB per day. In a mess, a well-structured routine of food is given.

review_summary.college_name: GIET University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The institute is good, but in order to get a good placement, we have work very hard.

content.Placements: Placements are good, but we need to work hard to get good placements. It means if students can work hard for their success, then they definitely can get a good placement here. If students want to enjoy, then they can expect a placement here. Hard work is required.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Buildings and hostels are a little old. But now they are upgrading everything, so there are no issues about infrastructure. The environment around here is cool and pleasant. Nature gives us a good feel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, placements are for skilled students in GIET University.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students are getting more than a 5 LPA package, and the rest are getting an average of 3.5 LPA. From our branch, Computer Engineering placements are for students who have 7 CGPA and above and maintain 90 percent attendance in the TNP classes. The rest of the students are getting free internships.
content.Infrastructure: College Wi-Fi is available and is very high-speed, but it has limited data for each student. The library is very big, has a huge number of books, and is open 24 hours. Hostel facilities are not that good. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel, and mobile data speed is also slow, even for Airtel. The quality of food is average. Medical facilities are available, but they are sometimes open and mostly closed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and big crowd environment in this college.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students are placed from our course last year. The highest package is around 20 LPA (only 10 students got it), and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Most of the time, the top MNCs coming to our college are Wipro, Accenture, Infosys, TCS, and Tech Mahindra. Data analyst and software engineer are the best roles offered by our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good because the campus is very big, and this university is located in the middle of mountains. Hostel facilities are manageable. Sports and medical facilities are available. Labs and classrooms are really good and equipped with Wi-Fi. Mess food is not good, as we are investing a lot of money.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: There is more focus on theoretical knowledge.

content.Placements: There is too much competition in the CSE field at this university. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 1-2 LPA. Many students get placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 7-8 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS and Tech Mahindra. Many students get internships in new startups, and not in highly rated companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the departments is well-structured and well-maintained. Unlimited Wi-Fi access is available in all department buildings and the library. In the hostel, Wi-Fi usage is restricted to only 2 GB per day. In a mess, a well-structured routine of food is given.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good for placement, GIETU.

content.Placements: GIET University provides good placement. 90 percent of students got placed from our course. The highest package is 26 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA, with an average of around 5 LPA to 6 LPA in our course. The top recruiting companies in our course are Wipro, Accenture, ZScalar, and TCS, starting from this year onwards. 80 percent of students got internships from our course in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure and the facilities are good. Our college course is well decorated and has free Wi-Fi and a library available for studies. The lab class is available with all equipment. Hostel facilities are also good. Mess food is hygienic, and it is adjustable for eating. Medical and sports facilities are also excellent.

admission_overview.college_name: GIET University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application, Fee, Selection

paragraphs: GIET University admissionis primarily entry-based. However, the university also accepts students on a merit basis for certain courses. Students are shortlisted based on a valid score in the accepted entrance exam followed by counselling (if applicable).GIET Gunupur Universityoffers a variety of courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral levels. These programmes are offered in several fields, such as Engineering, Technology, Social Work, Science, Science, Computer Applications, etc. Interested students can read the following article to learn more about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission procedure for GIET University.

GIET University Gunpur provides courses in full-time and regular mode. The university provides over twenty courses spanning several specialisations. Aspiring candidates can take a look at the following table for key highlights forGIET Gunupur University admissions 2025:

GIET University course admissionis subject to the fulfilment of course-specific admission criteria. Aspirants must either appear for the university-level entrance exam i.e.,GIETEEor provide a valid score of other accepted exams. through the various entrThe table below showcases the list of popular courses along with the selection and eligibility criteria to apply for popularGIET Gunupur University courses:

To get admission into the GIET University, students are required to complete the course-specific admission criteria. The admission process mainly commences online. Students need to apply for the desired course, followed by the selection process and admission confirmation. Interested students can follow the steps mentioned below to complete theGIET University admission process:
Step 1: GIET Gunupur University Application Process
The admission process starts with filling out the GIET Gunupur application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website of GIET University to apply for the course of their choice.
Step 2: GIET Gunupur University Selection Process

The university conducts its exams like GIETEE for BTech, BCA, BSc, MTech, and MCA courses. The university also accepts national-based entrance exams, such as CMAT/ MAT/ CAT/ XAT/ OJEE scores for the MBA programme.
Step 3: GIET Gunupur University Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure for BTech at GIET Gunupur University?
faqs.answer: The admission will be only on the basis of the marks secured in the GIETEE-, conducted by GIET UNIVERSITY. The candidates who have secured valid JEE Main rank are also eligible for taking part in the counselling process as 50% of the total seats are reserved for JEE Main/OJEE candidates. Students who have not appeared for the GIETEE/JEE Main/OJEE are not qualified for admission. Short-listed candidate based on their entrance examination rank and will be called for the counselling.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at GIET University?
faqs.answer: No, GIET University does not accept direct admissions for any of its courses. Students must fulfil both the eligibility and selection requirements before applying for any of the offered courses. The university accepts students primarily on an entrance basis. Aspiring candidates must provide the valid score of the accepted exam or appear for the GIETEE conducted by the university itself. In case of any queries, students may reach out to the admission help desk of the university.

faqs.question: When GIETEE entrance exam gets conducted in GIET Gunupur University?
faqs.answer: GIET Engineering Entrance Examination usually conducts from 18 Apr to 27 May for Computer Based Exam. The paper based examination will be conducts on 19 May & 26 May. The duration of the entrance examination is two hours. This is to note that, the dates mentioned here is to give an overall idea of the entrance exam. The dates may vary further.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in GIET University?
faqs.answer: Candidates looking to apply for the programmes offered at GIET University are advised to go through the prospectus and ensure that they fulfil the eligibility. Eligible students can apply for the desired course on the university's website. Admission to most of the courses offered by the university are done through valid entrance scores. Hence, aspirants must either provide a valid scorecard of the accepted exam or appear for the GIETEE. In some cases, students need to participate in the counselling for seat allotment. Selected candidates musy pay the tuition fees to secure their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What are the exams accepted by GIET University?
faqs.answer: GIET University accepts several national and state-level entrance exams for admission to its BTech programme. Further, the university also conducts its own exam to shortlist the candidates. Some of the accepted exams areJEE Mains, OJEE, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, etc. Alternatively, candidates looking to apply for the BTech, MBA, MCA, BSc courses offered at GIET University can also apply for theGIETEEexam through the university's official website.

faqs.question: How can I join BTech course without JEE at GIET Gunupur University?
faqs.answer: Students with qualified GIETEE exam are eligible to be admission to the BTech programme at GIET University. However, the candidate’s DOB should fall on and after 1997 to apply for GIETEE exam in order to get admission to GIET Gunupur University.

faqs.question: Who can apply for MCA programme at GIET Gunupur University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed a BCA or equivalent degree with 50% aggregate from any recognised University or Institute. Apart from this, students who have completed class 12/ BA with maths, BSc, BCom/ Graduation (45% aggregate in case of reserved category) are eligible for MCA pgramme at GIET University.

hostel_campus.college_name: GIET University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel with 1200 rooms, 3250 seats and attached washroom in each room, 24*7 Power Backup and Security system and Wi-Fi. Rooms are available in 1,2 and 3 seater basis. Guesthouse Facility for visitors with 15 nos. of Wi-Fi exquisite suites. Accommodation facility for faculties is also available on campus. Options of AC/ non-AC apartments are available.

library.description: 24*7 AC Library with 81000 books.	The University boasts of having one of the best libraries in Eastern India. Spread over an area of 1649 sq. meters, the library is equipped with an unmatchable collection of books, magazines, journals, CDs, DVDs. The library regularly subscribes to premier International and national print journals, electronic journals, and full-text online journals. The library plays an important role in ensuring the learning experience of the students as well as improving their knowledge.

The library regularly subscribes to premier International and national print journals, electronic journals, and full-text online journals. The library plays an important role in ensuring the learning experience of the students as well as improving their knowledge.

hostel.description: The hostel with 1200 rooms, 3250 seats and attached washroom in each room, 24*7 Power Backup and Security system and Wi-Fi. Rooms are available in 1,2 and 3 seater basis. Guesthouse Facility for visitors with 15 nos. of Wi-Fi exquisite suites. Accommodation facility for faculties is also available on campus. Options of AC/ non-AC apartments are available.

other_facilities: Mega Cineplex with a viewer capacity of 821

reviews.review_heading: The institute is good, but in order to get a good placement, we have work very hard.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Buildings and hostels are a little old. But now they are upgrading everything, so there are no issues about infrastructure. The environment around here is cool and pleasant. Nature gives us a good feel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, placements are for skilled students in GIET University.
reviews.review_text: College Wi-Fi is available and is very high-speed, but it has limited data for each student. The library is very big, has a huge number of books, and is open 24 hours. Hostel facilities are not that good. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel, and mobile data speed is also slow, even for Airtel. The quality of food is average. Medical facilities are available, but they are sometimes open and mostly closed.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and big crowd environment in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good because the campus is very big, and this university is located in the middle of mountains. Hostel facilities are manageable. Sports and medical facilities are available. Labs and classrooms are really good and equipped with Wi-Fi. Mess food is not good, as we are investing a lot of money.

reviews.review_heading: There is more focus on theoretical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the departments is well-structured and well-maintained. Unlimited Wi-Fi access is available in all department buildings and the library. In the hostel, Wi-Fi usage is restricted to only 2 GB per day. In a mess, a well-structured routine of food is given.

reviews.review_heading: Really good for placement, GIETU.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and the facilities are good. Our college course is well decorated and has free Wi-Fi and a library available for studies. The lab class is available with all equipment. Hostel facilities are also good. Mess food is hygienic, and it is adjustable for eating. Medical and sports facilities are also excellent.

reviews.review_heading: GIET University placement scenario.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is excellent. The facilities are also good. The course is well decorated with all the equipment. Free Wi-Fi is available, and labs and a library are available. The hostel is available for both boys and girls. Mess food is acceptable. Medical and sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing university to study at.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is excellent and attractive. It is well-organised. The lab facility and classrooms are well-organised. Here, we have a better 24-hour free Wi-Fi facility. A specialised experiential area is there for our project management activities.

reviews.review_heading: GIET University is the best private university. It provides good knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are good. Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus, including the lab and classrooms. In the library, almost all books are available, and it is always open for students. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and the management of the course are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so beautiful. There are all facilities in labs and classrooms like Wi-Fi, smart boards, projectors, and speakers. Most labs have an AC setup. In the library, AC is present, and it is open 24 hours for everyone. Medical facilities are very good. Sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: It provided good placements last year.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are average. Wi-Fi facility is available, but with a daily limit of 2 GB. Labs and classrooms are available with projectors and smart boards. The food quality of the hostel is bad because the same food is repeated every day. The taste of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: It has bad faculty members. Placements are not even good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The condition of classrooms and labs is average. Every classroom and lab has Wi-Fi, but most of them are not working. Hostel facilities are good, and some VIP hostels are recommended as they have air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good placements are available at GIET University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is big and well-designed. The infrastructure of the hostel is not much better. Our hostel provides Wi-Fi with a daily limit of 2 GB, but the speed of the Wi-Fi is very slow. In some classrooms, there is no Wi-Fi network, but the Wi-Fi network is available in labs.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent university to study .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is excellent. The classroom facility is also well organised. There is also available of central library. The Wi-Fi facility is also available for free to access. The hostel accommodation also provides excellent in campus for boys and in outside for girls. The sports facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing 3-tier college to excel in engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is attractive for its beautiful building with a mountain view. The inside classroom facilities are acceptable. The lab facilities are also acceptable. There are 24 hours of free Wi-Fi available on campus, and each department has its own Wi-Fi. The hostel food is just mean, acceptable, not very good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In labs, unlimited free Wi-Fi is provided. Our library has a well-defined infrastructure and central AC for students. In our university, Wi-Fi is available everywhere, and in our hostel, 2 GB per day free Wi-Fi is available. Those who want to study in the library can go there at any time for studies.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about GIET University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, Infosys, HighRadius, and Genpact visit our college for placements.
Placement cell of our college works very well to offer top roles to students.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, VTU ranks #69 under the category 'Engineering'.

The Karnataka PGCET 2026 exam for admission to the MBA and MCA courses will be held on May 14, 2026. For the ME/MTech course, the exam is scheduled for May 23, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum popular programmes are BTech and MBA. MBA students are taught Managerial Economics, Business Statistics, Marketing Management, Managerial Communication, and various other subjects. MBA students are placed in top companies. MBA students are placed as Managers, leaders, and in various other roles. Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum BTech students are given technical knowledge and are taught analytical skills.
Overall, Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Visvesvaraya Technological University rankings are there for Engineering, Management, and several other courses. Please find below the latest information about Vesveswaraiah Technological University, along with other courses:

placements.overview: The mode of Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on entrance exam scores and merit. The accepted entrance exams are KCET, COMEDK UGET, JEE Main, DCET, and others. Candidates applying through JEE Main must first register for the JEE Main exam. Then appear for the JEE Main exam. Then with valid JEE Main scores apply on the official website of the university. The below-mentioned are Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum admission dates for 2025:

The BTech course is offered in specialisations, such as Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Electronics and Computer Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Robotics and Artificial Intelligence, and others.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.

review_content.Placements: Good companies do come for placements, and it is the single best pro of this college. This year, the average package offered is around 11 LPA, with CSE leading in terms of employment and the highest package. The number of companies coming for internships is good. An ample chance is given for students to get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and I am satisfied.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in my course for a degree in microbiology, 2 to 3 LPA for a Master's, and 6 to 8 LPA. We will get jobs in hospitals, laboratories, and the food and dairy industry. Internships in clinical settings, hospitals, laboratories, and industries. Top roles for this course are microbiologist, laboratory technician, quality assurance, etc. They are eligible in hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in our department, and the network is also not good. Labs are provided with every instrument and chemical. Classrooms and libraries are good. Every facility is provided with more than 1000 books. The hostel and PG are provided with good-quality food and good facilities. The mess canteen in college also provides hygienic food. Sports and games are eligible for both girls and boys; we can participate in any of the sports in which we are interested.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good placements and faculty.

review_content.Placements: 80% students who sit for placements are placed. The average package is around 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Novigo, etc. The faculty ensures that every student gets internship opportunities. Almost everyone gets good internships. Faculty are very friendly and humble.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. AC labs and clean washrooms. Spacious classrooms. They provide a school bus facility, and the hostel is free for B.Tech CSE students, only the mess is to be paid. Karnataka CM recently visited our college. Student life is not that good because of the Muslim management.

course_faqs.question: Where can I apply for a scholarship as an MBA student of VTU?
course_faqs.answer: The students of MBA at VTU can apply for various scholarships being run by the State Government of Karnataka. For scholarships provided by the state government, students can apply at the State Scholarship Portal of the Karnataka government. The process for application and the scholarship helpline number is also available at the official website of VTU.

course_faqs.question: How can I check if I am eligible for a scholarship at VTU for MBA courses?
course_faqs.answer: MBA students of VTU are eligible for the scholarships offered by the state government of Karnataka. Every scholarship has its own set of eligibility conditions and scholarship amount. Details regarding the eligibility criteria, required documents and the amount can be found on the State Scholarship Portal of Karnataka Government on the official website of VTU.

review_summary.college_name: Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Some faculty members are, good average placements in 2025, average infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I am studying in 6th sem right now. So as of now, None of the students from my batch have been placed or have you gotten any internship offer. So I? Ll be taking my seniors batch as an example around 25 to 30 percent of them have been placed most of them in technical roles in companies such as Samsung, but few of them have been placed in core Industries such as Alten, the highest package was 10 LPA, the average was 6.8 LPA and the lowest was 4LPA. The top roles offered are software developed and in automation sector.
content.Infrastructure: The library is good. The classrooms are average size. I feel like it could have been a bit more bigger. The labs are mostly machines oriented, but the labs which have computers do have Wi-Fi facility. Overall I can say that it is average. The quality of food in the hostel is very good. The rooms are also of good size. Both indoor and outdoor games are available such as football, cricket, basketball, football tennis, caroom, chess and table, tennis. For a tier 3 college I think it? S pretty good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is better than I expected, but it can be even better. It has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placed in our college. The highest package offered overall is 28 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Infosys, TCS, Google, Cognizant, and Accenture hire students. I guess 70 to 80 percent of students got internships. The top roles offered are none, as we have not gotten the exposure yet.
content.Infrastructure: We have well-maintained labs. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. We have two libraries and even a digital library that helps with a quiet environment. The quality of food for me is actually very good. I'm extremely satisfied. It has a good hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.

content.Placements: Good companies do come for placements, and it is the single best pro of this college. This year, the average package offered is around 11 LPA, with CSE leading in terms of employment and the highest package. The number of companies coming for internships is good. An ample chance is given for students to get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and I am satisfied.

content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in my course for a degree in microbiology, 2 to 3 LPA for a Master's, and 6 to 8 LPA. We will get jobs in hospitals, laboratories, and the food and dairy industry. Internships in clinical settings, hospitals, laboratories, and industries. Top roles for this course are microbiologist, laboratory technician, quality assurance, etc. They are eligible in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in our department, and the network is also not good. Labs are provided with every instrument and chemical. Classrooms and libraries are good. Every facility is provided with more than 1000 books. The hostel and PG are provided with good-quality food and good facilities. The mess canteen in college also provides hygienic food. Sports and games are eligible for both girls and boys; we can participate in any of the sports in which we are interested.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements and faculty.

content.Placements: 80% students who sit for placements are placed. The average package is around 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Novigo, etc. The faculty ensures that every student gets internship opportunities. Almost everyone gets good internships. Faculty are very friendly and humble.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. AC labs and clean washrooms. Spacious classrooms. They provide a school bus facility, and the hostel is free for B.Tech CSE students, only the mess is to be paid. Karnataka CM recently visited our college. Student life is not that good because of the Muslim management.

admission_overview.college_name: Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Visvesvaraya Technological University admissionis done based onmerit and entrance-baseddepending on the course. VTU accept distinct national-level entrance exams, likewiseKCET, CMAT, GATE, JEE Main, etc. The University gives over 10 degree and diploma programmes across its seven departments, likewise, Aerospace Engineering, Applied Science, Civil Engineering, and Computer Science Engineering, etc. Also known asVTU, the university gives MTech and MBA as famous courses which are given in full-time mode. Interested students can read the below article to learn all about the admission criteria and procedure for VTU courses.

Visvesvaraya Technological Universityaccepts various national-level entrance exams for admission to its given courses. students should apply for the course-wise entrance exam. However, before applying students must qualify for the eligibility and selection criteria for the desired programme. The table below mentions the basic eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularVTU courses:

Visvesvaraya Technological University feesrange from 10,000 to INR 30 lakh. The VTU offers the courses via its 208 affiliated, one constituent, and 17 autonomous colleges under its jurisdiction. Therefore, the fees and seats tabulated below are the overall numbers offered:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Visvesvaraya Technological University has a multi- admission process. The admission may vary as per the affiliated colleges/constituents. Find below the common admission procedure as per VTU's admission guidelines:
1: Application process

students must visit the official website and select the programme they want to apply to. The application process requires students to fill out the online application form with all the required details and attach all relevant documents and certificates.
2: Interview, entrance exam, and GP

students' application forms will be scrutinised and selection will be made based on the eligibility criteria. Selected students will be invited for a counselling interview. students can choose any options for the interview process, which are one-on-one, online, or telephonic. Additionally, students must also appear for the entrance exam, personal interview, and group discussion as per the programme requirements.
3: Merit List/Cutoff/Counseling

Wait for the merit list to be announced by the college. The merit list will be based on the entrance exam scores and other criteria such cutoffs, academic performance, work experience, etc. Attend the counselling process and follow the guidelines provided by the college. The counselling process will involve document verification, seat allotment, fee payment, etc.
3: Seat offer

Once the application process and interviews are completed, the college admission official sends an admission offer to the students. Candidate must accept the offer by confirming it and paying the course fees.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does VTU Belgaum accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: VTU Belgaum is one of the top colleges of Belgaum. It offers a total of 107 courses under its MBA program. VTU accepts multiple entrance exams like KMAT/CAT/PGCET/MAT/ XAT entrance examination for admission to the MBA program. The final selection of the candidates will be made on the basis of scores obtained in the entrance examination.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required for MBA at VTU Belgaum 2023?
faqs.answer: There are no specified minimum marks required at VTU Belgaum for MBA as cutoffs are subject to change annually as per the course opted and the seat allocation. However, The general MBA eligibility criteria at VTU is securing a minimum aggregate score of 50% or above or equivalent CGPA in graduation from a recognised university. You can refer to the past cutoff trends for a better insight about the minimum marks required for admission to MBA.

faqs.question: Does VTU Belgaum accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: The undergraduate admissions at our institute are conducted through a comprehensive evaluation process that considers scores from various entrance exams. Specifically, for engineering programs, the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE Main) plays a pivotal role in assessing the candidates' aptitude and knowledge in the field. Additionally, for courses related to architecture, the Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET) is a key determinant in the admission process, emphasizing the importance of subject-specific assessments.On the other hand, postgraduate admissions offer a diverse range of programs including M.Tech, M.Arch, MBA, MCA, and MCA (Lateral). This variety reflects the institute's commitment to providing advanced education across multiple disciplines. The Master of Technology (M.Tech) and Master of Architecture (M.Arch) programs cater to individuals seeking specialisation in engineering and architecture, respectively.For those inclined towards management, the Master of Business Admin

faqs.question: Are there any internships in the curriculum of MBA Courses at VTU?
faqs.answer: Yes, the students pursuing MBA from VTU have to go through an internship during the second year of the course. Internship is a compulsory part of the MBA curriculum. Internship exams are held during the third semester of the programme. However, VTU is not known to provide any internship opportunities through any internship drive.

faqs.question: How are BTech placements at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The BTech placements at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) are quite good. UVCE has a placement rate of 90%, which is one of the highest among engineering colleges in India. More than 98% of students in the ISE and CSE branches get placed in UVCE, and the highest salary package offered in the previous year was 40 LPA. Around 115 companies have visited UVCE so far for the 2023 Batch Students and more than 353 offers have been made to students across various streams.

faqs.question: What are the fees for BTech programmes at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The total fee for a BTech course at the University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) ranges from INR 45,000 - INR 30 lakh. The BTech fees varies across the VTU's affiliated college. The fee is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The fees for BTech programmes at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) can be paid through the following methods: KCET fees can be paid through RTGS. University and exam fees can be paid online. No extra fee needs to be paid at UVCE other than the fee paid to KEA at the time of downloading the admission order

faqs.question: How much does BSc at Visvesvaraya Technological University cost?
faqs.answer: The Visvesvaraya Technological University BSc fee structure includes the tuition fees, registration fees, e-consortium fee, student sports fees, etc. The tuition fee is the most major component of the fee structure. It ranges from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 3.8 lakh for various specialisations. The fee amount differs for the students from and outside of Karnataka. The fee mentioned information is taken from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence indicative.

rankings.highlight: 18th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025

nirf.description:
VTU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for VTU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, VTU fell 26 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, VTU fell 82 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, VTU fell 28 ranks to #50 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

reviews.review_heading: Some faculty members are, good average placements in 2025, average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library is good. The classrooms are average size. I feel like it could have been a bit more bigger. The labs are mostly machines oriented, but the labs which have computers do have Wi-Fi facility. Overall I can say that it is average. The quality of food in the hostel is very good. The rooms are also of good size. Both indoor and outdoor games are available such as football, cricket, basketball, football tennis, caroom, chess and table, tennis. For a tier 3 college I think it? S pretty good....

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by SJC Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is better than I expected, but it can be even better. It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have well-maintained labs. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. We have two libraries and even a digital library that helps with a quiet environment. The quality of food for me is actually very good. I'm extremely satisfied. It has a good hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St. Aloysius College MagaluruReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good and I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our department, and the network is also not good. Labs are provided with every instrument and chemical. Classrooms and libraries are good. Every facility is provided with more than 1000 books. The hostel and PG are provided with good-quality food and good facilities. The mess canteen in college also provides hygienic food. Sports and games are eligible for both girls and boys; we can participate in any of the sports in which we are interested.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by PA College of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. AC labs and clean washrooms. Spacious classrooms. They provide a school bus facility, and the hostel is free for B.Tech CSE students, only the mess is to be paid. Karnataka CM recently visited our college. Student life is not that good because of the Muslim management.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dayananda Sagar College Of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall good college with supportive faculty, good campus life. Sports facilities aren't great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good, and it has one of the biggest campuses in Bangalore, but the hostel is overpriced. Coming to food, the mess isn't that good, and the quality doesn't match the price we are paying. Labs are conducted every week and have Ethernet LAN connections. The college library is good and has Wi-Fi as well, so you can come and study anytime. Borrowing books from there requires a card.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by R.N.S. Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average engineering life of a Bangalore college student.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well lit and spacious. Desks have extra space to keep your things. Projectors are there in each classroom. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library. A digital library is also present for people with no laptop. The labs have systems with good specs too. Hostel students are also quite satisfied.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by JSS Academy of Technical EducationReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college with good infrastructure and college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty decent and cannot be considered as low. The college campus is not that much huge but it can be considered as average. The course is pretty good. The hostel is also decent. Hostel infrastructure and all are good. The library, classrooms, Wi-Fi, sports, etc., are good. In the hostel, rooms are very spacious, but the food is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by BMS College of EngineeringReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College is good, and students won't be disappointed in any of the aspects.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are proper. 24/7 Wi-Fi connection and labs for different purposes, which are helpful for research and development. Properly silent, good, and large library. Hostel quality is so good, the mess is clean, the canteen is clean, and it provides a variety. Medical facilities are also good, and sports and games are on top.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MCE - Malnad College of EngineeringReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The happy Malnad, turning point of your life.
reviews.review_text: As you know, Civil is the hardware course. Here, you get to know about how buildings are built, how the loads are distributed among the buildings, the concentration of materials used in a building, etc. Overall, the course I have chosen is the interesting course that I personally love.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MCE - Malnad College of EngineeringReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placement with scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are satisfactory with clean rooms, 24/7 water, and electricity supply. Wi-Fi connectivity and adequate security, the misfit quality coverage is good, both offering vegetarian and non-vegetarian options while the canteen provides snacks and refreshment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by B.N.M Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very beautiful. We have supportive staff members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel environment is very good. The food served is superb. coming to the Wi-Fi, we will get the network easily and quickly. Our college is good at sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dayananda Sagar College Of EngineeringReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, but I wanted some more good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is old, and it's a very old building. Some classrooms are in very bad conditions, but nowadays, they are working on problems and sorting them out. I do not stay in a hostel, but a few of my friends say that's good compared to any other college. There are two hotels in our college, one is the NRI hostel, which has a good infrastructure and good room space, but the con is that they don't have proper food facilities. The other is an Indian hostel, which has g...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Acharya Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Acharya is great in the new era.
reviews.review_text: Acharya has a great infrastructure. We have facilities for all work and sports. Wi-Fi is great in college. In quality and quantity, Acharya is great. Here, we can get Wi-Fi in our phones. It has many sports persons and state-level players.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by R.N.S. Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with placements in 2025, good faculty, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are of a high-level experience and are friendly; they help in guiding research and participation in competitions. Wi-Fi is available on all floors with good downloading speed, and the canteen is pocket-friendly for students with great taste, offering more space and being super clean. The library has all kinds of books for studies and computers in different rooms, and the lab is equipped with all working computers.

data.description: Yes, VTU has hostel facilities for its students within the campus itself. Hostel is available on single occupancy basis. Both male and female students are provided with separate hostels at VTU. The university also has mess facilities available at the campus. Students can visit the campus to apply for the hostel.

college_info.college_name: Visvesvaraya Technological University Belgaum Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total fee for a BTech course at the University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) ranges from INR 45,000 - INR 30 lakh. The BTech fees varies across the VTU's affiliated college. The fee is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The fees for BTech programmes at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) can be paid through the following methods:KCET fees can be paid through RTGS.University and exam fees can be paid online.No extra fee needs to be paid at UVCE other than the fee paid to KEA at the time of downloading the admission order

The Visvesvaraya Technological University BSc fee structure includes the tuition fees, registration fees, e-consortium fee, student sports fees, etc. The tuition fee is the most major component of the fee structure. It ranges from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 3.8 lakh for various specialisations. The fee amount differs for the students from and outside of Karnataka. The fee mentioned information is taken from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence indicative.

The students of MBA at VTU can apply for various scholarships being run by the State Government of Karnataka. For scholarships provided by the state government, students can apply at the State Scholarship Portal of the Karnataka government. The process for application and the scholarship helpline number is also available at the official website of VTU.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of its good teachers, decent placements, and super college life.

review_content.Placements: More than 85% of students got placed overall. More than 60% of ECE students got placed and got very high packages. The highest package is 80 LPA. The average package for the ECE branch ranges from 12 LPA - 13 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Nvidia Information, EDGE, Gamecroft, etc. Over 50% of students got internships from our course in top companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Google, and JP Morgan. Top roles offered are machine learning engineer, research and development engineer, and software analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent enough. There is one hostel room with an attached washroom, desk, chair, and cupboard for 2 people in the library. There is availability of journals and other books. Labs are equipped with everything. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Classrooms have whiteboards as well as a projector for smart learning. Mess is available in the hostel itself. There is a medical shop just outside the campus and a 24/7 available ambulance in case of emergencies. Both indoor and outdoor games are available like chess, table tennis, cricket, football, carrom, etc. There is availability of gym with equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has a decent college life and is good to study in.

review_content.Placements: As of April 30, 2024, IIIT Guwahati placed 62.5% of CSE students in its 2024 batch. The highest salary package offered reached 52 LPA, and the average salary being offered was 15.26 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Amazon, Atlassian, Cisco, DE Shaw, Deloitte, DeltaX, and Flipkart. Roles offered are software engineer, full stack developer, DevOps engineer, product manager, and a few others.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good in the academic building but it is not reliable in the hostels. Labs are decent, and the classrooms are quite comfortable. Library has a decent seating area. The hostel is good, but the food served is not good. In terms of medical facilities, we have an ambulance. There is a gym, badminton court, table tennis, carrom, chess, cricket, and football facilities available.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Guwahati Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in the Northeast after IIT Guwahati to join.

content.Placements: We do have a placement cell at our institute which brings many companies to the institute for placements and internships. The placement cell motivates the students to do internships so that they will get good work exposure and experience. It helps students find jobs more easily.
content.Infrastructure: The campus totally covers an area of nearly 70 acres. The total campus is lush green. We have one administrative building where daily classes go on and are equipped with labs and the library. There are three boys hostels, two girls hostels, and one faculty member's residential building. We do find many food stalls around the campus and a student activity center.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has good faculty members, good placements in 2025, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: The placement cell in our institute has been working hard and is now almost at its peak. Due to COVID-19, placements have decreased, but as each year passes, it is getting an exponential curve upwards. The cell considers every student and helps each one of them. Talking about internships and placements off campus, a lot of students even is placed in companies like Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, and ISRO as well (a lot more but these were on top of my mind). Average placement is above 17 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of the Indian Institute of Information Technology is very big. The infrastructure is also very good. There are many classrooms in college. Classrooms are equipped with AC. There is a single library. There is a town hall in which we enjoy many cultural programs. There are two canteens on our college campus and mini canteens outside the campus.
