individual_reviews.title: It has a decent college life and is good to study in.

content.Placements: As of April 30, 2024, IIIT Guwahati placed 62.5% of CSE students in its 2024 batch. The highest salary package offered reached 52 LPA, and the average salary being offered was 15.26 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Amazon, Atlassian, Cisco, DE Shaw, Deloitte, DeltaX, and Flipkart. Roles offered are software engineer, full stack developer, DevOps engineer, product manager, and a few others.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good in the academic building but it is not reliable in the hostels. Labs are decent, and the classrooms are quite comfortable. Library has a decent seating area. The hostel is good, but the food served is not good. In terms of medical facilities, we have an ambulance. There is a gym, badminton court, table tennis, carrom, chess, cricket, and football facilities available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A review on our campus: IIITG.

content.Placements: Our college has a separate placement cell, which helps students get jobs. The percentage of students who got placed is 97 percent, with the highest package of 120 LPA and an average of 17 LPA. The companies that are recruiting are Amazon, TCS, Filpkart, Games craft, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was spread across 67 acres, including an academic block, two boys hostels, one girl hostel, 1 faculty block, a student activity center, and a lake. Facilities in our campus included 1Gbps Wi-Fi, large collections of books in library, etc. An ambulance was available 24/7 with a medical kit. Students activity centre consists of gym, badminton court, table tennis, etc.

admission_overview.description: IIIT Guwahati admission offers various UG, PG, and PhD level courses in the field of Engineering with admissions based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must appear for JEE Main exam followed by counselling conducted by JoSAA to receive admission to their flagship BTech course. For admission to an MTech or PhD course, aspirants are required to have a valid GATE/ NET scorecard. IIIT Guwahati is one of the recently established IIITs situated in Assam. Applications for the programmes are accepted online. Students seeking IIIT Guwahati admission can read the following article to learn about the detailed admission procedure for the institute.

paragraphs: IIIT Guwahati admissionfor BTech starts with theJEE Mains Applicationand ends with payment of the acceptance fee. The admission process for MTech and PhD is conducted by the IIIT Guwahati itself. Students need to apply to their desired courses with all the required documents and valid scorecards. IIIT Guwahati then shortlists the candidates based on merit and marks secured in the entrance test. Shortlisted candidates are then called via email for the interview process. Candidates who clear the interview process go through the document verification and are allotted seats, which they need to confirm by paying the seat acceptance fee. Refer to the steps mentioned below for a detailed IIIT Guwahati admission process:
Application Process

Admission at IIIT Guwahati are based on the course-specific entrance exam. For example: for BTech, candidates must apply for JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced application. For MTech admissions, applications are through GATE. Also, for PhD admissions the college accepts GATE/ CSIR/ UGC NET scores.
Selection Rounds
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The cutoff for BTech, MTech, and PhD courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. IIIT Guwahati will release the course-wise merit list for merit-based courses on its official website. As per the merit list, candidates are called for counselling for seat allotment. Shortlisted candidates must then pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

TheIndian Institute of Information Technology Guwahati feeranges betweenINR 3 lakhandINR 10 lakh. The fees are to be paid to confirm seats once candidates are shortlisted. When it comes to affordability, the cost of the programmes can be quite expensive, however, the institute offers tuition fee waivers and scholarships to the students. Students can look at the following table to know aboutIIIT Guwahati feeand average package:
Note: The data is taken from official sources and may change.

IIIT Guwahati intakechanges based on course and specialisation. The institute offers a limited number of seats for its courses. At IIIT Guwahati seat allocations are done on candidates' performance in the selection rounds and admission finalisations. Students are required to participate in the counselling process conducted by the respective authority for seat allocations. faqs.question: Can I get into IIIT Guwahati for BTech without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: No, candidates can not get admission into the BTech course without a valid JEE Main score. The institute accepts students for its flagship programme on an entrance basis. It is important that students appear the entrance test and clear the cut-off for the institute. Post the result declaration, students need to register for the counselling process. Selected students need to go through document verification and pay the fees for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the IIIT Guwahati selection process for BTech programme?
faqs.answer: Students looking to get into BTech at IIIT Guwahati need to fulfil the basic eligibility. The basic eligibility of the course is to pass Class 12 with PCM subjects and a minimum aggregate of 75%. Final selection is done based on JEE Mains score. Once the results are out, students can register for JoSAA counselling and select IIIT Guwahati as the preferred college while filling out the form.

Students can pursue the course in three specialisations;  Computer Science & Engineering,Electronics & Communication Engineering. Admission to this course is based on a GATE score followed by COAP counselling. Eligible students seeking admission must qualify for the entrance exam for admission to IIIT Guwahati. faqs.question: What is the IIIT Guwahati M.Tech CSE highlights?
faqs.answer: IIIT Guwahati offers two years M.Tech programme across multiple specialisations. Computer Science and Engineetring is among the specialisation. faqs.question: How can I apply at IIIT Guwahati?
faqs.answer: The mode of application at IIIT Guwahati is online. Students can check the step-wise application process below:Go to the IIIT Guwahati official website.Hover on the Admission tab to select the desired course.Select the specialisation, scroll down, and click on the option of Apply now.Fill the form with all the required documents.Submit the form.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IIIT Guwahati?
faqs.answer: IIIT Guwahati admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. For BTech, the accepted exam is the JEE Main. MTech admissions are held on the basis of GATE scoring. Students can pay the application fee and confirm their admission after the counselling round.

faqs.question: What is the fees of IIIT Guwahati JoSAA?
faqs.answer: IIIT Guwahati BTech seats are filled by the Joint Seat Allocation Seat (JoSAA) after qualifying the JEE Main exam. The counselling body doesn't have any registrtaion fee, the filling-in of choices on the online portal is free of cost. However, candidates might have pay the seat acceptance fee . The documents uploaded by the candidate will not be verified unless the candidate pays the seat acceptance fee. General/Open category candidates are required to pay a fee of INR 35,000, whereas SC, Gen-PwD, ST, OBC-NCL-PwD, ST-PwD, and SC-PwD have to pay INR15,000 through e-challan or through SBI net banking. The fees will be included in the semester fees once students confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for IIIT Guwahati M.Tech CSE?
faqs.answer: The Indian Institute of Information Technology Guwahati (IIIT Guwahati) offerd two years M.Tech programme under multiple sprcialisations, including Computer Science & Engineering. The BTech CSE eligibility criteria is as follows:Candidates with BE/BTech degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology / equivalent programme.Candidates with MSc (Computer Science/Information Technology)Graduates (AMIETE) from the Institution of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineers (IETE) in Computer Science and EngineeringMCA from a recognised Institution.NOTE:Candidates with any one of the above mentioned eligibility criteria will be eligible for admission.

placement_data.title: IIIT Guwahati Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIIT Guwahati BTech placement rate in 2025 was 66.69% . The highest and average packages offered to BTech students was INR 71 LPA and INR 16.75 LPA . In addition, the median package stood at INR 9 LPA . 206 students registered for the placement drive 2025 out of which 138 students were placed in leading companies. The top recruiters of IIIT Guwahati included Microsoft , Amazon, Google, Atlassian and Samsung. The highest package offered during the placement drive 2024 was INR 52 LPA and the average package stood at INR 14.88 LPA . 109 offers were made during the placement season 2024.

description: IIIT Guwahati cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Guwahati JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:
Important: Top IIITs Cutoff for JEE Main: Past Years Cutoff Ranks and Trends

In this section, candidates can view the last 10 years of IIIT Guwahati JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Guwahati JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Guwahati CSE cutoff 2025 was 28255 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 44592, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Guwahati B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 28255 and 44592 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 28255 and 44592, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Guwahati. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Guwahati to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Guwahati. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

facilities: Hostel: There are two hostels, one for boys (400 students) and the other one for girls 100 students). Single and double occupancy rooms are available with attached washrooms. The first year students ge

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the Northeast after IIT Guwahati to join.
reviews.review_text: The campus totally covers an area of nearly 70 acres. The total campus is lush green. We have one administrative building where daily classes go on and are equipped with labs and the library. There are three boys hostels, two girls hostels, and one faculty member's residential building. We do find many food stalls around the campus and a student activity center.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members, good placements in 2025, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the Indian Institute of Information Technology is very big. The infrastructure is also very good. There are many classrooms in college. Classrooms are equipped with AC. There is a single library. There is a town hall in which we enjoy many cultural programs. There are two canteens on our college campus and mini canteens outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of its good teachers, decent placements, and super college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent enough. There is one hostel room with an attached washroom, desk, chair, and cupboard for 2 people in the library. There is availability of journals and other books. Labs are equipped with everything. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Classrooms have whiteboards as well as a projector for smart learning. Mess is available in the hostel itself. There is a medical shop just outside the campus and a 24/7 available ambulance in case of emergencies. Both indoor and outdoor g...

reviews.review_heading: It has a decent college life and is good to study in.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good in the academic building but it is not reliable in the hostels. Labs are decent, and the classrooms are quite comfortable. Library has a decent seating area. The hostel is good, but the food served is not good. In terms of medical facilities, we have an ambulance. There is a gym, badminton court, table tennis, carrom, chess, cricket, and football facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: A review on our campus: IIITG.
reviews.review_text:
Our campus was spread across 67 acres, including an academic block, two boys hostels, one girl hostel, 1 faculty block, a student activity center, and a lake. Facilities in our campus included 1Gbps Wi-Fi, large collections of books in library, etc.
An ambulance was available 24/7 with a medical kit. Students activity centre consists of gym, badminton court, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A glimpse of IIIT GUWAHATI.
reviews.review_text: The complete campus is Wi-Fi enabled, the labs are well-equipped, the classrooms are well maintained, and they are digital classrooms. In the library, you can find all the books related to your academics and other books based on your interests. The mess food can be eaten and the hostel rooms are well maintained. In the room, we get a bed and a fan with attached washrooms. The mess food quality is okay, and we have quite a few canteens across the campus. The first-aid facility is readily availabl...

reviews.review_heading: It will be an amazing college in the upcoming years.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an air-conditioned academic building that is open 24/7 and labs are kept open for students to study in, the library at our college is well-equipped with books and materials needed by students. The college provides 5G Wi-Fi and a table connection. Labs are well-equipped too.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, and simple infrastructure .
reviews.review_text:
All facilities are available: 24 hours of Wi-Fi, 18 hours of library access, etc. 
We had a canteen in the academic block and a night canteen. The food available here is mainly North Indian food, twice a week: chicken and fish. For vegetarians, they provide paneer and potatoes.

reviews.review_heading: Good academic life but not campus life.
reviews.review_text: Since the campus is still under construction, most of these facilities are not available. But hostels are good and mess food is up to the mark. You can have a nice academic life. 24*7 Wi-Fi, electricity, and water supply are available. The sports complex is also undergoing construction.

reviews.review_heading: The information you should have before getting admission in iiitg.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is new so there is still some development to be made by the college. The management of college is doing its best to make a better campus everyday. The hostel is good and the infrastructure is not as good as IIT but it is enough.

reviews.review_heading: A student's opinion on IIITG.
reviews.review_text: The Academic block is equipped with Wi-Fi. There are labs for CSE students as well as for ECE students. There is a library in the institute. The books in the library are sufficient for the course. The hostel rooms are good. Each room in the hostel is shared by two people. The mess food is hygienic and tasty. There are canteens in both academic block and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very great for its curriculum and its average placements.
reviews.review_text: Some buildings are yet to be made like there is no clubs and no gymkhana. Even the students have to go outside the campus for gym etc. There is no proper ground for football basketball. Only for cricket is present. Also the roads are full of ditches and no well furnished.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides impressive placements.
reviews.review_text: Library is small, but students can use CSE labs for study purposes. Labs have top-notch infrastructure. Classrooms are awesome. Wi-Fi is good enough. The entire academic block has top-notch infrastructure with centralised air-conditioning. Hostel rooms are better than some IIT hostels. Mess food is not good. Medical facilities are weak. In the coming years, sports facilities will be upgraded. Work is currently going on.

reviews.review_heading: Come to this college if you like ventures.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark. It is quite average and not what an Institute of national importance should be like. Anyway you should come to this college only for placement purpose and not for any other things. Extracurricular activities are a strict no go.

reviews.review_heading: It is a place for uncertainty and new experiences.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Hostel is great. Laboratories are decent. There are 3 boys' hostels and 1 girls' hostel.

data.description: IIIT Guwahati faculty is highly qualified and learned. Out of the total faculty members, maximum members are PhD holders in relevant fields. The remaining faculty is highly qualified and has expertise in respective courses and fields.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IIIT Guwahati - Indian Institute of Information Technology, Assam

likes.text: Top recruiting companies were Amazon, TCS, Microsoft, Toppr, Byju's, Infosys, Wipro, Samsung, Mettle, Jio, Distill, IBM, Infotrust, ThoughtWorks, Zaloni, CoinDelta, EdgeTensor, etc.
Our college has a strong industry connection, so students get a wide range of job opportunities in the field after graduation.

likes.text: Teachers are well qualified from top institutions like IITs, IISC, University of Edinburg, University of Taiwan, etc.
Our institutes' curriculum is quite good as we learn the mathematical part first and then we move to the scientific and technical part of the course.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Ranchi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Don't come on the basis of college or any data i.e. available on internet or website of college.

content.Placements: Almost 80 percent students got placed last year from campus. 47 LPA is the highest, and 4–5 LPA is the lowest while average is 7–8 LPA. TCS, Wipro or HCL visit college for placement. There is no internship provided by college, you should do yourself. Software engineer frontend or backend developed.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is new building and from last year students can get room. All facilities are given to students such as Wi-Fi, library etc. Food is decent, Canteen is also good, medical facilities are also available. There is no playground so you cannot play outdoor game.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty. Placements were good in 2023. It has a beautiful campus.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 46.9 LPA for the B.Tech CSE student in 2023. In 2023, 86 percent of students got placements. In biotechnology, the package offered is 47 LPA. In 2025, the highest package offered is 24 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, TCS, Flipkart, and Cognizant. The university offers a 100% internship rate.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very comfortable and big. Chairs, desks, and everything are comfortable. Labs have all facilities. The library is quite huge, and it has comfortable chairs. We can issue books anytime. It's pretty nice. The hostel rooms are nice. The only problem is that sometimes it comes with poor water management. Hot water is sometimes not available for bathing. But overall, everything is good. Wardens are helpful.

admission_overview.college_name: Amity University Ranchi Admission 2026: Registrations, Dates & Eligibility

paragraphs: Amity University admissions begin in January and continue till July. Amity University, Ranchi existed in 2016 and functions under the Amity Group of Institutions. Two names know it— either Amity University Jharkhand or Amity University Ranchi.Amity University Ranchioffers undergraduate and postgraduate courses inEngineering, Management, Commerce, Computers, andLaw. The admission to all courses is done based on academic record, score in the Amity written test, and performance in the personal interview. For an MBA, candidates must also clear the Management Aptitude Test. It is only after clearing all these stages that students will be given an offer of admission.

Amity University Ranchi course admissions 2026is currently open. Amity Ranchi admissions are offeredentrance-based. Amity University Ranchi admission for MBA is based on a valid score of entrance exams such asCAT/MAT/GMATother than that all direct admission is offered based on the merit performance of candidates. Interested candidates can visit the official website to apply for the course of their choice. Candidates can read the table below to learn more about Amity University admission highlights:
Particulars
Amity University Ranchi Admission Highlights 2026
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
16+ courses in multiple specialisations
How to apply?
https://amity.edu/ranchi/amity-ranchi.aspx
Application Status
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Download Now

Amity University, Ranchi admission is open for all UG and PG courses. The duration of UG courses is three years, whereas PG courses are of two-year duration. Admission to all the courses is merit and entrance-based. The table below has theAmity University Ranchi courseseligibility and selection criteria:

Amity Ranchi admission is a multi-step process. Candidates seeking for getting admission to UG/ PG courses of the university must go through a detailed Amity University Ranchi admission process. To admit the right candidates, the university selects students based on selection criteria, which include filling the application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and paying for the Amity University Ranchi fees at the time of final admission.
Step 1: Amity University Ranchi Application Process 2026

The Amity University admission process begins by filling out an application form on the official website of Amity University Ranchi. If candidates wish to apply for more than one programme, they need to fill out a separate form for each course by paying an application fee ofINR 1,500each. The new users are required to generate login credentials fill an online application form with all the relevant details and documents and submit the form on the admission portal of Amity Ranchi.
Step 2: Amity University Ranchi Selection Process

Amity Ranchi admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For most of the UG & PG courses, candidates are selected based on merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Further, the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the Personal Interview round, which is mandatory to qualify for admission to every course. Candidates have to qualify for exams such as Amity- Joint Entrance Examination etc.
Step 3: The Final Offer Letter

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the final result will be declared. The information concerning selection will be communicated on the admission microsite as well as via Email and SMS. Selected candidates will get an admission letter along with important information such as semester fee, class commencement date, time, venue of the course, allotment of a hostel (If applied), scholarship (If any) and the list of documents required at the time of joining. Candidates also have to pay a certain amount as per the Amity Ranchi fees structure to secure their seats.

faqs.question: Is Amity Ranchi best for engineering or not?
faqs.answer: Amity University institution has managed to secure its spot in the top 50 colleges in NIRF Ranking framework. It is one of the best colleges for Engineering courses. It is also the most choosen universities among the students for B.Tech and other engineering courses. For admissions to B.Tech courses, Amity JEE/JEE Mains score is considered. It offers multiple specializations for the engineering courses likeCivil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at Amity University, Ranchi?
faqs.answer: The fee structure for Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering at Amity University, Ranchi is INR 6.68 Lakhs (for 4 years). Tuition fee is calculated on the basis of 1st year. Actual amount may vary. The fees might include components other than tuition fees.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at Amity University, Ranchi?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission in Bachelor of Technology in computer Science and engineering  at Amity University, Ranchi is 10+2 with a minimum of 55 percent from a recognized board/Institution or the student must have participated in Amity Joint Engineering Entrance.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Amity Ranchi?
faqs.answer: Amity University, Ranchi is a prestige private University. As per NIRF rankings the University is ranked amongst the top 50 . The university invites students for about 8 streams and 24 courses for admissions in the institute. Majorly the admissions are based on CUET score of the students. There are multiple various specific criterias for different courses. The application for admissions can be submitted online. Certain courses do conduct personal interviews and group discussions for the students . The entire admission process is user and student friendly.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Amity Ranchi?
faqs.answer: For admission in the Amity Ranchi University, the student must studied the related subjects like PCM, PCBM, etc. in the intermediate. For studying BE, B.Tech in Amity Ranchi University the student have to scored 70% in PCM and must have obtain a good rank in JEE exam. The Amity Ranchi provides different courses like BSC, BTech, BBA, LLB, MBA etc. The student must need a higher marks in intermediate grade and score good in JEE board for getting admitted here.

faqs.question: Can I join Amity Ranchi without CUET?
faqs.answer: The admissions for multiple courses are based on academic record, score in Amity written test and performance in the personal interview. The admissions at  Amity University, Ranchi for Undergraduate courses are done on the basis of the score obtained in class 12th. Admissions are usually merit-based along  by a written examination and a personal interview with the faculty.

faqs.question: Are admissions in Amity Ranchi open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Ranchi admisisons are open. The university accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. The application window is open. STudnets can apply directly through the official page.

faqs.question: What is the BTech fee at the Amity University, Ranchi and how can I pay it?
faqs.answer: The Amity University Ranchi BTech fee varies across the BTech specialisations/ streams offered at the university. The total tuition fee payable over the course duration of various specialisations ranges between INR 5.2 lakh and INR 7.6 lakh . Selected candidates must pay the first instalment of the total fee to confirm their admission. In addition to the tuition fee, they may have to pay certain one-time charges. The fees can be paid using online modes of payment or a DD. Cash and cheques are not accepted by the university. The mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the MBA fee at the Amity University Ranchi?
faqs.answer: The total Amity University Ranchi MBA tuition fee is INR 7.16 Lacs for two years. It is divided into semester-wise instalments. The fees vary for sponsored and non-sponsored candidates. After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to pay the first instalment of the total fee to confirm their seats. It can be submitted using online modes of payment or a DD. Cash and cheques are not accepted by the university. The mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Ranchi Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Separate hostels for boys and girls

library.description: The libraries are more like Integrated Knowledge Resource Centres that are stocked with over 2652 in total volume, 801 titles, periodicals, references, national and international journals, covering all aspects of academic studies and research materials.

The libraries are more like Integrated Knowledge Resource Centres that are stocked with over 2652 in total volume, 801 titles, periodicals, references, national and international journals, covering all aspects of academic studies and research materials.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Don't come on the basis of college or any data i.e. available on internet or website of college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is new building and from last year students can get room. All facilities are given to students such as Wi-Fi, library etc. Food is decent, Canteen is also good, medical facilities are also available. There is no playground so you cannot play outdoor game.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty. Placements were good in 2023. It has a beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very comfortable and big. Chairs, desks, and everything are comfortable. Labs have all facilities. The library is quite huge, and it has comfortable chairs. We can issue books anytime. It's pretty nice. The hostel rooms are nice. The only problem is that sometimes it comes with poor water management. Hot water is sometimes not available for bathing. But overall, everything is good. Wardens are helpful.

reviews.review_heading: College is good all over, depending on how you utilize the resources available.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good.  Classroom, labs, and library are good. Wi-Fi is fast, and the quality of food is the best. All necessary items required by students are available. There is no playground, and the college is outside the city.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, like all necessary items are provided on campus and hostel, like good purified water, and for summer, it is chilled, then the whole campus is air-conditioned, and the labs which are given to us are well-updated with current technologies.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Amity provides us with good classes with updated labs with current technologies and library, smart classes, air-conditioned campus, and high-speed Wi-Fi. For a hostel, all necessary facilities are given, and a mess too. There are not many sports given, but they do some tournaments like Samarthan.

reviews.review_heading: Nice place for learning new things.
reviews.review_text: Facilities given to us include a library with books from all domains, labs with up-to-date technologies and specifications, Wi-Fi in the whole campus, smart classrooms for live coding or demonstrations, air-conditioned rooms, and many more. I don't have any idea about the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good for those who can't go outside of Jharkhand or Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a good library for a better environment for studying in free period and books for study resources, and a class projector is provided for digital class or to show a live example. On campus, we get air conditioners, good coverage of Wi-Fi, and organized labs for every stream.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice place to get a good environment and skill development.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in Amity. It provides air-conditioned classrooms with a projector for live examples. There are well-updated labs with current technology. It has good Wi-Fi speed and a good number of classrooms. The library has all the required books, facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment for learning skills.
reviews.review_text: Facilities that Amity offers include a good environment, air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi coverage, a library for study materials, and computer labs with updated specifications. In the hostel, all necessary items are provided, such as beds, fans, and AC if opted for.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, with Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, and digital classrooms provided throughout the campus, along with well-updated labs and a library facility. The classroom sizes are really good, and for hostels, boys and girls get different buildings, and everyone gets sufficient and necessary facilities in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review for future ones.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities that are given are like fully centralized AC in whole campus then Wi-Fi, well updated multiple labs.

reviews.review_heading: Brief idea about Amity University, Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: Whole campus has centralized AC. Library, classroom, and labs are well-equipped. Whiteboards are present in the class along with a projector and a microphone for giving presentation. Library is present on 2nd floor and it's huge with all the books you need for your course. I have never bought a single book because I can issue any book I want from the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and bad placement.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. AC, Wi-Fi, lab, library, and classrooms are available. They provide almost everything and they conduct mentor meet to check upon every facility once a month. The hostel is not that good as it's very small and the food is also very average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my Amity Law School.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. Library is really good. There is availability of Wi-Fi and projectors in classrooms. Every classroom has AC. The food in the canteen is also good. One can have food from a variety of options. Regarding sports, the infrastructure is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and advanced technology in the college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and Wi-Fi also works smoothly. Classrooms are so advanced and good. Library has almost all types of books available. Facilities are very good. Hostel rooms are clean. The food is also healthy and really good. All types of sports are available.

data.description: Amity University Ranchi appoints well-trained and expert faculty members. The faculty help the students in their career growth. The faculty focuses on theoretical and practical knowledge for the students.

The total Amity University Ranchi MBA tuition fee is INR 7.16 Lacs for two years. It is divided into semester-wise instalments. The fees vary for sponsored and non-sponsored candidates. After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to pay the first instalment of the total fee to confirm their seats. It can be submitted using online modes of payment or a DD. Cash and cheques are not accepted by the university. The mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

college_info.intro:
JSS Science and Technology University is popular for its Engineering and Science courses such as BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies. Also, the course is approved by the AICTE and the Government of Karnataka. BTech specialisations include Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Biotechnology, Environmental Engineering, etc.
JSS Science and Technology University Mysore MBA is offered for a duration of two years in full-time mode. MBA students can become Management Consultant, Investment Bankers, or can enter fields such as Marketing, Healthcare, Human Resources, and others. JSS Science and Technology University MBA is taught by well-qualified and experienced faculty members.

reviews_list.review_title: Good to go. Need to concentrate more on placements than the attendance and just the book knowledge.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of batch 2024-2025. In my batch, the placement numbers are decent. Out of 120 students, around 35 students got placed, where the average package is 5-6 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is above average. Each class had projectors and all labs had fast internet connection. Coming to the hostel, I'll rate it 3.5. The food is sometimes good and sometimes bad. Gymnasium is good. Importance is given to sports and physical education.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges in Mysore, if you are willing to do MCA.

review_content.Placements: According to my knowledge, in our MCA batch, around 80-85% of students were placed through campus placements. The highest package offered was around 12.4 LPA, while the lowest was 3.5 LPA, and the average package stayed around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, LTIMindtree, Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, and Bosch. Nearly 60% of the students also got internships in companies like TCS, Infosys, startups, and analytics-based organizations, mostly in roles like software development, web development, and testing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Business System - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: JSS Science and Technology Mysuru review and 2026 placement.

review_content.Placements: The placements of this college are decent. The average package you can expect in this college is around 10 to 11 LPA, and the median is around 9 to 9.5 LPA. The overall placement percentage is around 80 percent, including all branches. Around 90 percent of students in CSE-related branches are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. Since this is an old established college, the infrastructure is outdated compared to other colleges through CET or COMEDK. It is an old-styled college. But the hostel facilities are very good, as the hostels are newly built.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.

content.Placements: Good companies do come for placements, and it is the single best pro of this college. This year, the average package offered is around 11 LPA, with CSE leading in terms of employment and the highest package. The number of companies coming for internships is good. An ample chance is given for students to get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great placement, average infrastructure, and a peaceful campus.

content.Placements: The placement rates of our college are pretty great, 80 to 90 percent of students got placed last year. This year the highest package offered is 40LPA. Among IT related Branch CSE, AIML, ISE, CSBS, the average package offered is around 13 to 14 LPA, and the median package is above 12LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities provided by our college are below average. The main CSE building, Golden Jubilee Bhavan, and the admin block are great, but the rest of the buildings are pretty average. For freshers, they conduct classes in the Polymer Science building, whose classrooms are pretty bad. They really need to improve it.

admission_process.title: JSS Science and Technology University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JSS Science and Technology University Admission 2025 is open for the UG and PG courses, BTech, MTech, MSc, and MBA. Admission to the engineering courses is done through CET, COMED-K, JEE. The Unversity accepts Karnatak PGCET for admission to its PG programmes. The admission process is completely online. JSS Science and Technology University offers more than 50 courses across multiplem specialisations. Find below the highlights of the Uiversity:

Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

SS Science and Technology University Admission 2025 for all of its courses is either done through entrance exams or course specific qualifying. Find below the admission process of SS Science and Technology University:
Step 1: SS Science and Technology University Application process
Candidates are required to visit the University's admission portal to fill the application form. Before that candidates have to register themselves to create a profile.
Step 2: Eligibility Check

Once the application form is submitted, it will be scanned for course specific eligibility. Basically candidate's application form will be checked for proff that he/she have the qualification for admission to their desired course.
Step 3: Provisional allotment
After the eligibility check candidates will be provided with allotment list, where the name of candidates who have secured seat for admission at the University will be listed.
Step 4: Fee payment
Now the candidates have to pay the fees for finalising their admission at the University.

faqs.question: Can I attempt COMEDK exam if I fail to score an appropriate rank for BE admissions at JSS Science and Technology University in KCET?

The dates for the results of KCET is very close to the date of exam for COMEDK. If the candidates feel like they would not be able to score the appropriate rank in KCET, they should apply for COMEDK as soon as possible. The official website for these exams will contain the timeline candidates need to follow.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admissions into BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University?
faqs.answer: No, to be eligible for admissions into BE courses at JSS Science and Technology University, candidates need to clear either the KCET exam or the COMEDK exam. Candidates do not need to clear both exams to be eligible for BE admissions at JSS Science and Technology University. The admissions at JSS Science and Technology University is based on the cutoff list of the above mentioned exams.

description: JSS Science and Technology University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

JSS Science and Technology University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 2608 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 3769 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at JSS Science and Technology University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 2608 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 2393, while in 2023, it was 6254.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

JSS Science and Technology University accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6390 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the JSS Science and Technology University B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 15742 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 21598. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STU.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is dirty and neglected. Cleanliness does not exist for the warden. Our college lab facilities are decent and well-equipped. Notably, the golden jubilee block is the best out of all. Sports facilities are good since the college is huge. An in-house gym is available too, which is free for the college students.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement, average infrastructure, and a peaceful campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities provided by our college are below average. The main CSE building, Golden Jubilee Bhavan, and the admin block are great, but the rest of the buildings are pretty average. For freshers, they conduct classes in the Polymer Science building, whose classrooms are pretty bad. They really need to improve it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good to go. Need to concentrate more on placements than the attendance and just the book knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. Each class had projectors and all labs had fast internet connection. Coming to the hostel, I'll rate it 3.5. The food is sometimes good and sometimes bad. Gymnasium is good. Importance is given to sports and physical education.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 1 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Mysore, if you are willing to do MCA.
reviews.review_text: SJCE provides a very good infrastructure for MCA students. Our department had Wi-Fi-enabled labs, updated computer systems, spacious classrooms, a digital library, and access to the main library with thousands of books and journals. Hostel facilities were decent with clean rooms, study areas, indoor games, and 24/7 security. The mess food was manageable, and the canteen options were better with snacks and meals available throughout the day. The campus also has sports grounds, a health center, gy...

reviews.review_heading: JSS Science and Technology Mysuru review and 2026 placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. Since this is an old established college, the infrastructure is outdated compared to other colleges through CET or COMEDK. It is an old-styled college. But the hostel facilities are very good, as the hostels are newly built.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent here, and the students have a good environment for studying. A good number of playgrounds are present for sports. I am not a hosteller, so I do not have a good idea about hostels, but its good. Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the college.

reviews.review_heading: Well-maintained campus and a smart, ready campus for engineers.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, green and clean smart campus, Wi-Fi available. Good and large library with digitalised and modern computers. A large and silent reference hall for studying. Hostel rooms are large and spacious with 24-hour electricity and water supply, and food in the mess is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An excellent college and a good presentation.
reviews.review_text: Buildings are huge and available for almost 500 students. Hostel facilities are kind of good, but the food facilities are at an average level. They have park grounds and fitness and physical facilities. Our hostel is eco-friendly projecting various plants and wildlife.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: I also live in a hostel that is inside the college, and the food provided is okay, kind of average and the rooms are pretty clean. The Wi-Fi provided here is pretty fast, and there is also a garden, and playgrounds are provided for students to play. And all the labs are well-equipped with new equipment and study materials.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college in Mysore for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over in one or two acres, which is a massive area for our infrastructure. The new buildings have amazing throat. This year, it is one of the best campuses in Mysore with all types of facilities, including well-equipped libraries, playground and labs with the latest equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering in Mysuru with modern, huge and green campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with all basic facilities and services available like Wi-Fi enabled campus, digital library, sport grounds, gym, prayer hall with greenery and cleanliness maintained all around campus. Hostel is good at the price they offer with decent food, as everyone’s taste differs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSS Science and Technology University, Mysore.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and college infrastructure are good, but the building is now outdated because it is an old-established college. This college was established around the 1970s. The campus is well-maintained, and it's a lush green campus, and you get full campus Wi-Fi coverage.

reviews.review_heading: If you are on the right path, the college helps you a lot by giving many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our campus are good. The only problem is that there are no charging ports in classroom benches. Labs and libraries are well-equipped. We have three types of libraries in our college. First is the normal library, where we can find many books. Second is the digital library, where we can access soft copies of books. Third is the reference library, where we can also find books.

reviews.review_heading: JSS Science and Technology University, Mysuru 2026 placement. SJCE placements review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for this college is good, but this college was established in 1970, so the infrastructure is outdated. The condition of the hostel for both boys and girls is good. The campus is full of lush greenery, and the crowd is also good, and the campus is surrounded by Wi-Fi.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, JSS STUReviewed on 16 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in our city.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilitated two hostels for students, our hostel has good facilities and Wi-Fi. The course here is academically excellent, providing good technical domain knowledge to students. Our college has the best infrastructure in the city, it has several playgrounds, labs with the latest instruments etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JSS Science and Technology University

likes.text: Top companies like Visa, Cisco, Intel, TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, Sixt, Benz, etc., visit our college for placements.

The hostel is quite homely and good, But food is a thing which needs to be compromised by students.

likes.text: The exams are tough as it is an autonomous college, But it helps students to study more and prepare well for the future.
Most teachers are qualified with Masters and many with Ph.D. The course curriculum is well-designed as it doesn't come under VTU.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Our college curriculum is excellent.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% students got placed with an average CTC of 17 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Swiggy, Make My Trip, American Express, Cred, etc. Top roles offered are software engineering and data science, and with the highest package of 1.2 crores in the last year, and this year, 2 to 4 students are placed in Google and Microsoft.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very neat and clean, having facilities like hot water for bathing and both normal and cool water for drinking and with 2 badminton courts for playing. 1 common room which has a TV and table tennis for playing. Classrooms are good, having facilities like a smart board, AC, etc. Food is also good, like providing chicken biryani on Sunday and chicken curry on Wednesday.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: In 2015, the placements are good, but in 2023 they decreased by 20 percent.

review_content.Placements: Here in IIIT Naya Raipur, the placements are good. The highest package in this college is 1.30 CPA. The average package for the CSE branch is 18 LPA, for the DSAI branch it is 16 LPA, and for ECE it is 14 LPA. The placement percentage here is more than 90 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is in average condition, and the labs in our college are very good. We have six labs, and every lab is in good condition: DLD lab, Sensors lab, IoT lab, Robotics lab, and AIML lab. We have medical facilities like a small dispensary on campus with basic medical facilities. The mess and canteen are very good and clean. We also have a sports complex where we can play badminton and basketball.

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Naya Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Studies are manageable if you don't procrastinate.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of students got placed with an average package of 17 LPA, and top recruiting companies are Swiggy, Make My Trip, American Express, Cred, etc. Top roles offered are software developer and data scientist. Students get an internship from the first year itself, depending on their talent and coding or video editing skills, but there is no particular official data about it.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very neat and clean, having facilities like hot water for bathing and both normal and cool water for drinking, and with 2 badminton courts for playing and 1 common room which has a TV and table tennis for playing, and classrooms are good, having facilities like smart board, AC, etc. The food is decent. Don't expect food like your home, but it's edible. The quality is good, but you get bored eating similar items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and labs, but remote location and tough IT placements for ECE students.

content.Placements: In our branch, there are 70% of students get placed with amazing packages. The recent highest package is 50 LPA, an average of 20 LPA and a minimum of 10 LPA from the ECE branch. Many of the students took the ECE branch here to get core jobs, like in VLSI designing.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides very good facilities like a 24/7 wi-fi network, labs with good equipment, and air conditioning. Classes with digital screens. In the hostel, each room contains two beds and separate desks for each student, and we have a library. The food is so nice compared to other institutes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college curriculum is excellent.

content.Placements: Around 80% students got placed with an average CTC of 17 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Swiggy, Make My Trip, American Express, Cred, etc. Top roles offered are software engineering and data science, and with the highest package of 1.2 crores in the last year, and this year, 2 to 4 students are placed in Google and Microsoft.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very neat and clean, having facilities like hot water for bathing and both normal and cool water for drinking and with 2 badminton courts for playing. 1 common room which has a TV and table tennis for playing. Classrooms are good, having facilities like a smart board, AC, etc. Food is also good, like providing chicken biryani on Sunday and chicken curry on Wednesday.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: In 2015, the placements are good, but in 2023 they decreased by 20 percent.

content.Placements: Here in IIIT Naya Raipur, the placements are good. The highest package in this college is 1.30 CPA. The average package for the CSE branch is 18 LPA, for the DSAI branch it is 16 LPA, and for ECE it is 14 LPA. The placement percentage here is more than 90 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is in average condition, and the labs in our college are very good. We have six labs, and every lab is in good condition: DLD lab, Sensors lab, IoT lab, Robotics lab, and AIML lab. We have medical facilities like a small dispensary on campus with basic medical facilities. The mess and canteen are very good and clean. We also have a sports complex where we can play badminton and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with placements and internships.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my college is approximately 60%. The highest package is 1.2 crores, the top recruiting companies are American Express and Swiggy. Nearly 40% students are doing internships in my college in different companies. Research and internships are offered through my course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good. The food is okay, but sometimes it is bad. Even though we have a large population, the Wi-Fi connection is good. The quality of facilities in my hostel and canteen is good. The sports culture is good at my college. They conduct several events in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Studies are manageable if you don't procrastinate.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very neat and clean, having facilities like hot water for bathing and both normal and cool water for drinking, and with 2 badminton courts for playing and 1 common room which has a TV and table tennis for playing, and classrooms are good, having facilities like smart board, AC, etc. The food is decent. Don't expect food like your home, but it's edible. The quality is good, but you get bored eating similar items.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and labs, but remote location and tough IT placements for ECE students.
reviews.review_text: This college provides very good facilities like a 24/7 wi-fi network, labs with good equipment, and air conditioning. Classes with digital screens. In the hostel, each room contains two beds and separate desks for each student, and we have a library. The food is so nice compared to other institutes.

reviews.review_heading: Our college curriculum is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very neat and clean, having facilities like hot water for bathing and both normal and cool water for drinking and with 2 badminton courts for playing. 1 common room which has a TV and table tennis for playing. Classrooms are good, having facilities like a smart board, AC, etc. Food is also good, like providing chicken biryani on Sunday and chicken curry on Wednesday.

reviews.review_heading: In 2015, the placements are good, but in 2023 they decreased by 20 percent.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is in average condition, and the labs in our college are very good. We have six labs, and every lab is in good condition: DLD lab, Sensors lab, IoT lab, Robotics lab, and AIML lab. We have medical facilities like a small dispensary on campus with basic medical facilities. The mess and canteen are very good and clean. We also have a sports complex where we can play badminton and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with placements and internships.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good. The food is okay, but sometimes it is bad. Even though we have a large population, the Wi-Fi connection is good. The quality of facilities in my hostel and canteen is good. The sports culture is good at my college. They conduct several events in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of IIIT Naya Raipur.
reviews.review_text: The amenities provided by the university are up to the mark. Hostel food is average, but the internet is very good. The rest of the academic infrastructure is built according to students’ needs. Sports facilities provided by the university are also good.

reviews.review_heading: A good college, with really low fees and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The academic building has central AC. Wi-Fi connectivity is average, but the Ethernet facility at the hostel is pretty impressive. The hostels, food, and facilities on the campus are generally good, especially the environment and the sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and a growing campus environment.
reviews.review_text: Labs are updated. Wi-Fi works very well. Classrooms are simple but clean. The library is small but useful for study material. Hostel rooms are decent and basic. Mess food is mixed. Some days it is good, and some days it is average. Sports facilities are available, including a multisport complex, football ground, volleyball, cricket, kabaddi, badminton, basketball, table tennis, and NSS programs.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a bad college and offers good value for money.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, as it was constructed just 10 years ago. There is a separate hostel for first-year students. The food is okay, not bad. The food in the canteen is slightly better than the mess. The hostel rooms are double sharing for first- and second-year students.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on the campus, but the mobile signal is very poor inside the campus. Every room has the ethernet facility. There is a library and top-facilitated labs. The food menu in the mess is very good, but the taste of the food is average. Compared to other colleges, our mess food is much better.

reviews.review_heading: I am not exactly satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: We get good Wi-Fi in both the college and the hostel. We have two badminton courts in our hostel, and corridors are maintained hygienically. Food quality is okay. Medical facilities are also good. Classrooms are filled with central AC, and digital boards are used for teaching. There are also speakers so that the lecture is audible to everyone. Sometimes, the quality of food does not reach our expectations, so we need to adjust. Otherwise, it is good on most days.

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum, few fests, good infrastructure and lab facilities.
reviews.review_text: As this is a newly constructed campus, the infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi facility is available, and the campus is clean and green. All the classrooms are neat, and the lab equipment is also new and in proper condition. A library is also available. The food is not bad here, but if you are South Indian, you have to adjust to the spices.

reviews.review_heading: The college is recommended if students need less strength and quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good, and classrooms have Wi-Fi. Hostels are also really good. The library is open during morning hours, and we can find it open till 10:30 PM or 11 PM sometimes. Labs are also well-equipped. It is provided with internet everywhere. We can explore sports, but college does not focus on sports much.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, value for money
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with centralized air-conditioning, internet, and digital boards. The institution is fully equipped with moderate labs, computer systems, and a library with a good collection of books. Constructed in 2015, it has new buildings with basic facilities. There is a non-AC hostel with double-sharing rooms. There are separate hostels for 1st-year boys and girls. From 3rd year, single-sharing rooms are allotted. There is a football ground also used for cricket, a palm park, gy...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the maintenance are very good.
reviews.review_text: Personally, I like the hostel because they provide double-sharing rooms, which I like, and the hostel maintenance is good. They provide a 500 Mbps high-speed Ethernet connection. We have a medical dispensary. They do not charge any fees for medicine or doctor appointments. There is a big indoor sports complex with one basketball court and two badminton courts. We also have two badminton courts in each hostel and a common room with a TV and a table tennis room.

reviews_list.review_title: GITA, where knowledge meets opportunity.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students got placed in the last year. The highest average package is 8 LPA, and the lowest average package is 3 LPA. Every student is getting internships here. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and some startup companies are visiting here to hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every department has a separate lab and classrooms. Wi-Fi is given to every student. A world-class library is available. Hostel facility is also good and comfortable. Food is very healthy and hygienic. Sports facilities are also available here, and we are allowed to play on the ground. There is also an indoor court for table tennis and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Affordable engineering degree.

content.Placements: I guess according to this year till now, only 40 percent of senior students have been placed. The highest goes as high as 5 to 6 LPA and the lowest is around 2.5LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are TTLP electronic and some others. Everyone got internship in some power companies.
content.Infrastructure: Well Wi-Fi classroom and library are fine but the labs are below average all the equipment is out of date and some of them are not even working. The hostel is very good from the 2nd year and there are a lot of restrictions in the 1st year. Administration eases up a lot in the 2nd year. Food is okay. It is eatable.

admission_process.title: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement admission 2025is currently open. The institute offers courses, such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Besides the UG and PG courses, the college also offers BTech and MCA Lateral Entry and doctorate-level courses. The institute is affiliated withBiju Patnaik University of Technology. To be admitted toGITA, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers over 12 courses in various streams such as Business and Management Studies, Engineering and IT & Software etc. The application process at GITA is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theGandhi Institute for Technological Advancementcourse admission2025.

GITA also offers PhD courses and admission criteria for the same is through entrance exam + interview. The candidates must pass post-graduation to enrol for PhD course at GITA. Candidates who possess a valid score in UGC-NET/UGC-CSIR NET (including JRF)/GATE/ Teacher Fellowship/ MPhil degree need not appear for the written test but need to appear for a personal interview.

The mode of study at GITA is full-time. The basic eligibility criteria to enrol for course admission at GITA are Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG courses. Some of the popular courses are BTech, MBA, MCA etc. Read on to know more aboutGandhi Institute for Technological Advancementcourse admissions2025.

GITA courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. The university also acceptsCUETscores for a few courses such as MTech, MBA, MCA etc. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection atGandhi Institute for Technological courses:
Postgraduate Degree/ MPhil degree or Provisional Certificates as applicable

Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement admission process includes registration, entrance exam score and counselling excluding PhD course. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in GITA:
STEP 1: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on registration, entrance exam score and counselling as per respective courses.
STEP 2.1: GITA PhD Admission Selection Criteria

Admission shall be based on the marks secured in the entrance test and interview, subject to the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria and the rules of reservation. Once, the candidates proceed further need to submit the necessary documents. Aspirants are advised to keep ready the following documents for the selection procedure:
Note: The above-listed certificates are to be submitted at the time of interview at GAC, Bhubaneswar
Documents need to be submitted (in original) at the time of admission for verification:
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: How can I join BTech course after Class 12 at Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement?
faqs.answer: To enrol for BTech course admission at Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement after Class 12, the basic eligibility is Class 12. Candidates must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the subjects from Chemistry / Biology /Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational Subject / Electronics / Computer Science / Information Technology /Geology/ Statistics. Apart from the eligibility, the selection criteria for the course are JEE Main,

courses_data.name: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, OJEE, CAT
courses_data.description: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement offersMBAcourses at the PG level. A total of 180 seats are available for this course. Candidates who are looking for MBA course admission must complete a Bachelor’s degree examination of minimum three years duration from any University of Odisha.

faqs.question: What is the MBA course duration at Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement?
faqs.answer: It is a two-year course spread over four semesters at Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement. The MBA course degree is offered through BPUT. It is a specialised course which provides the quickest entry to the Business Administration industry. It also caters for the needs of Business Administration-enabled services, banks, BPOS, KPOS and various requirements of the public and private sector.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA course at Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement?
faqs.answer: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement shortlists candidates for MBA programme based on MAT, XAT, CAT, ATMA, OJEE. Candidate whi have completed Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering/Technology/Architecture/ Pharmacy examination of minimum four/five years duration in any discipline from any University of Odisha can also enrol for MBA admission.

placement_data.title: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement Placement overview
paragraphs: Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement Bhubaneshwar (also known as GITA Bhubaneswar ) has one of the finest placement cells in Odisha. The placement cell provides training sessions and seminars to the students before the final placements enabling them to get higher packages. GITA Bhubaneshwar also has academic tie-ups with companies such as TCS, Infosys, Oracle, Wipro, etc. The placement cell also offers various cells such as Industry Institute partnership Cell (IIPC Cell) and Entrepreneurship Development Cell (EDP Cell) to organise several activities such as:
Below mentioned are some of the insights regarding GITA Bhubaneswar placements 2020:
Placement Particulars
Highest salary package
Average salary package
Consultant, Academic Consultant, Software Engineer, Software Developer
TCS, Infosys, Oracle, Wipro

While Byju’s offered the highest package at GITA Bhubaneshwar, Infosys and Lintech Electric offered the maximum number of placement offers to the students. MS Infra Engineers offered jobs to students only from Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) stream.Also, Vodafone extended offers to three students of MBA.
Below mentioned are the top recruiters that hired students from GITA Bhubaneswar placements in the past are mentioned below:
Q. Does GITA Bhubaneswar offer any placement assistance?

A. Gandhi Institute for Technological Advancement Bhubaneshwar has a separate department for placements headed by a dedicated team that works relentlessly towards fulfilling the career aspirations of students.
Q. Who was the star recruiter of GITA Bhubaneswar?
A. Byju's was the star recruiter of GITA Bhubaneswar as it offered the highest package of Rs 9 LPA during the placements 2019-20.
Q. What all placement-related skills does GITA Bhubaneswar help students with?
A. Students of GITA Bhubaneswar are trained by skilled-professionals in mastering aptitude tests, group discussions (GD) and personal interviews (PI) before appearing for the final placements.
Q. Which are the major recruiters of GITA Bhubaneswar?
A. List of the popular recruiters at GITA Bhubaneswar include TCS, Infosys, Oracle, Wipro, etc.
Q. What roles are offered to students of GITA Bhubaneswar in the major recruiting companies?
A. Students of GITA Bhubaneswar get a variety of roles such as Consultant, Academic Consultant, Software Engineer and Software Developer among others.
Q. What is the highest placement package offered at GITA Bhubaneswar for the session 2019-20?
A. The highest placement package offered at GITA Bhubaneswar is Rs 9 LPA.

reviews.review_text: Every department has separate lab and classrooms. Wi-Fi is provided to every student. World class library is also available here. Hostel food is so good and hygienic. Sports facilities are also available here. There is a playground and indoor court for students.

reviews.review_heading: Shaping a bright future at GITA College.
reviews.review_text: For every department, there is a separate lab and classes. Wi-Fi is given to every student. Hostel facility is so good. Food is hygienic and tasty. Menu changes every two months. reviews.review_heading: Bright future with Gita College.

reviews.review_heading: Bright future towards success with Gita College.
