reviews.review_heading: To grow, you need to read and analyse first.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is such appealing to the eye, but the hostel is of very poor quality. The infrastructure of the hostel is good, but the food quality is unbearable. The food is of such quality that even the students with the strongest immunity will not be able to survive. The college has a canteen, a medical room, multiple sports grounds multiple in number, a basketball court, a football ground, a table tennis court, etc. It also has Wi-Fi and a well-stocked library.

reviews.review_heading: Before paying lakhs, do check the reviews.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so appealing that the students don't wish to go outside the campus. It has canteens, libraries, sports grounds, clubhouses, and all the rest of the refreshment facilities, which help the students get their minds refreshed from the academic stress. The hostel is okay, but the food quality is poor; hence, it is not worth it. Even the healthiest can get sick by eating hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: To grow, need to research first.
reviews.review_text: The most attractive part is the infrastructure. The infrastructure is so pleasing and mesmerizing that you tend to get greedy to take admission in this college. The library, classes, and labs are all top-notch. I took the hostel facility for three years. Last year, I stayed in a shared PG (flat). The hostel is okay, but the food quality is the worst. You cannot survive on hostel food at all. That was the only reason I left the college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Read, go through, then enter.
reviews.review_text: The only thing that attracted me to this college is the infrastructure. College has beautiful infrastructure with spacious library, labs, sports room, and other facilities. The worst hostel experience of mine is the college hostel. The food is something I have never experienced. The only thing I will not recommend is the hostel food and hostel inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good for education and hostel, but placements are weak. Not recommended for jobs.
reviews.review_text: Campus has basic facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms with projectors, computer labs, a decent library, and some sports facilities. However, labs and equipment are not updated regularly. Hostel facilities are average. Rooms are okay but a bit crowded. The mess food is manageable but not very hygienic. Medical support is limited. Sports and extracurricular facilities exist but are not very well-maintained.

review_summary.college_name: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is decent, but if you have a good score, find better options.

content.Placements: I am doing a BE in mechanical engineering at Ajeenkya Dy Patil School of Engineering in Pune. This is a decent college, according to the cut-off. College is average according to the package. The average package here in mechanical engineering is about 3-4 LPA. Many average and some good companies visit the campus, but not all students get a good package on campus, it is decent according to the cut-off. Nestled, Wipro, Tata Motors, TCS, and HDFC Life companies like this have picked students from our college with a good package, but it can also be off-campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The curly tables of ADYPU.

content.Placements: As of now, the college placement doesn't seem good to me, like the placement rates are very low, to be honest. Mostly, the company doesn't take mass recruitment from the college. The highest package that I know is somewhere around 50 LPA. The good thing is that college provides placement preparation. The lowest I would say was around 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, but it doesn't seem to work every time. For example, we have Wi-Fi everywhere in college, but it doesn't give the desired speed for completing your work. The classrooms and library are good. The hostel infrastructure is good, but guests have the same problem of not having good facilities. Even the mess food is not included in the hostel, so you have to buy it. Medical facilities are not that good, but they will work.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued Feb(2026) B.Com (Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Strong placements and a great place to learn.

content.Placements: The placement cell at our university is quite proactive. It starts preparing us from the third year itself with aptitude training, mock interviews, and resume-building workshops. For our course 85 percent of students who opt for placements get placed successfully. The highest package offered is around 18 LPA from a major product-based company while the lowest is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has modern classrooms equipped with smart boards and projectors. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with decent speed, which is a great help for research and project work. Labs are excellent. We have specialized labs for various domains, including an Apple Lab for iOS development, a Data Science lab with high-end systems, and robotics labs. The central library is huge and well-stocked with a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources.

Ajeenkya DY Patil University course admissionis entrance-based. The university accepts students based on scores secured by them in the common entrance test conducted by the university. Further, students need to appear for a PI round followed by counselling for seat allotment. Students seeking to get into any of the offered courses are required to fulfil the eligibility requirements before applying. Aspiring students can check below the eligibility, & selection requirement for some of theADYPU courses:
Eligibility
12th in any stream or 3-yr full-time diploma
ADAT + Personal Interview (PI)

12th or equivalent with Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects & Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology or any technical vocational subjects as optional with a min. of 50% aggregate (45% reserved category & a person with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only)

To get into Ajeenkya DY Patil University, students are required to go through several steps. These steps include application, entrance exam, selection rounds, counselling, & seat confirmation. As admissions to the courses offered at the university are entrance-based, students need to clear the ACET exam conducted by the university to be eligible for admission. The process mainly commences online. Interested students can follow the below-mentioned steps to complete theADYPU admission process:
Step 1: ADYPU Application Process 2026
Interested students can visit the university's official site & apply for the ACET exam by registering themselves. The application process commences online.
Step 2: ADYPU Selection Process 2026

AYDYPU selects students based on their performance in the ACET test. Aspirants must appear & clear the entrance exam to get into the desired course. It is also important that the students meet the course-specific admission criteria. Further, students need to appear for the personal interview rounds conducted at the university. For admission to the MBA programme, students need to appear for the Group Discussion (GD) rounds. Admission to the design courses is done on the basis of the Studio Test followed by other selection rounds.
Step 3:ADYPU Admission Confirmation
The university sends the Admission Offer Letter once the students are shortlisted. Students need to accept the letter & complete the admission process.

Eligible students can proceed with the admission process of the university by registering for the ACET exam. faqs.question: Which entrance exam is conducted for admission to Ajeenkya DY Patil University?
faqs.answer: Ajeenkya DY Patil University conductsADYPU Common Entrance Test(ACET) to shortlist students for admission to various courses. It is a computer-based test conducted online across various centres. Students looking to get into any of the courses offered at the university need to appear and clear the test. This test is valid for the programmes offered by any of the constituent schools of the university. Interested students can visit the official website of the university to apply for the exam.

Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can get admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements.

reviews.review_heading: College is decent, but if you have a good score, find better options.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, classrooms are also decent, but the auditorium hall is small, according to the college and the number of students. The hostel is very good, security and cleanliness are good in the hostel, but the mess is not that good. For events and sports, the college hosts many cultural events, sports tournaments of BGMI, like game downloads, that happen on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The curly tables of ADYPU.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, but it doesn't seem to work every time. For example, we have Wi-Fi everywhere in college, but it doesn't give the desired speed for completing your work. The classrooms and library are good. The hostel infrastructure is good, but guests have the same problem of not having good facilities. Even the mess food is not included in the hostel, so you have to buy it. Medical facilities are not that good, but they will work.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty members, excellent placements in 2024, and really good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the university have been top-notch. It has excellent campus. We have simple and clean classrooms. There is a spacious library. A lot of indoor facilities are also provided. Hostel is 4/5, there are a lot of cafes around the campus so it has become a hangout spot in leisure time. Sports facilities have been solid, good coaches, separate grounds for every sport, such as basketball court, pickleball court, football ground, and cricket ground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 25 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If you are seeking a decent placement and good faculty members, you can go with ADYPU.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure, and also study environment is pretty much happening. As of 2025, the classrooms and study environment are also very good. Hostel facility is also nice, and rooms are big enough for you not to have any trouble. If you are well-skilled to make a good company around you, then the years of hostel life will also be fun.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by School of Management, Ajeenkya DY Patil UniversityReviewed on 21 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and a great place to learn.
reviews.review_text: Our department has modern classrooms equipped with smart boards and projectors. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with decent speed, which is a great help for research and project work. Labs are excellent. We have specialized labs for various domains, including an Apple Lab for iOS development, a Data Science lab with high-end systems, and robotics labs. The central library is huge and well-stocked with a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 19 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, supportive faculty, and a modern campus for tech enthusiasts.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for my B.Tech computer science course at Ajeenkya DY Patil University is modern and comfortable. We have campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, spacious digital classrooms and a library with extensive print and online resources. Hostel rooms are clean and have basic amenities. The mess food is decent offering veg and non-veg options, though sometimes repetitive. The canteen serves a variety of snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies. There are a...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University-School of LawReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Law student life at DY Patil Law College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great for law students here; we have a moot court hall, a seminar hall, and even classrooms that are quite spacious. We have projectors in each classroom, and the library is also well-stocked with the latest books. It consists of many national and international journals, Supreme Court cases, bare facts, etc. Hostels are also clean; some rooms have attached washrooms as well, but we are provided with fans in them, not ACs. The food is also good in the hostel, and both veg an...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University-School of LawReviewed on 21 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: ADYPU - Law faculty members are really good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top-notch. We have smart classes, classrooms are clean with proper lighting and Wi-Fi. Library doesn't have much books but online soft copy will be provided. Lexis Nexis is available for all law students free of cost. Computer facility is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: My experience as a first year student at ADYPU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in some places is really impressive. However, it is lacking in some places. Also, there is a network problem in our area, and the Wi-Fi is not up to the mark. The canteens and mess are available. There are a few games like 8-ball pool and punching bags available for students. The fans and computer are not performing well in the dental building.

reviews.review_heading: Students here learn mobile application development.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there are several facilities. They are excellent like good Wi-Fi, neat and clean labs, classrooms, and library. Hostel are also good and hygienic. Mess food is also good in taste. There are medical facilities provided in the college. Sports and games are also conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Management, Ajeenkya DY Patil UniversityReviewed on 23 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Ajeenkya DY Patil University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. The availability of courses is vast. The hostel is also quite student-friendly like Rs. 1,70,000 per semester. You will not get food included and not get laundry included so it is on a costly side. They have those facilities. You can avail and there are many like food stalls and restaurants in the college. There is stationary and everything a student needs in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 7 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, good education, the best entertainment, great fests, events, etc.
reviews.review_text: There are big classrooms, and digital boards are there. The hostel facility is nice. The quality of the food is nice. There is good quality Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and a collection of books in the library. There are also medical facilities, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 2 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Fine faculty members, average placements, below average hostel, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The students say the hostel is average and too much messed up. They prefer a flat or PG/hostel outside the campus because it is cheap and has a good return on investment. Also, the charge for college hostel is too high and they don't even provide food at that price. The food on the campus canteen is too expensive. You will get laundry service of Rs 26,000 just for some 30+ laundry in an academic year, which is the worst price return.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by School of Management, Ajeenkya DY Patil UniversityReviewed on 23 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Most admiring envy with a lot of memories.
reviews.review_text: Approximately it's very nearer to the center of the city so students from various locations can do their courses. Some safety measures and emergency equipment were set up in a college as a precautionary measure. Also, some students from the other states were studying here, and they were helped with the required needs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ajeenkya DY Patil University, School of EngineeringReviewed on 7 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but weak management .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are quite nice. The buildings are posh. The surroundings are clean and green. The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are adequate for students. The quality of facilities in the hostels is good but quite expensive. The quality of food is also nice, but it is not included in the fees for a hostel.

college_info.college_name: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Ajeenkya DY Patil University provides scholarships to students with the aim of promoting academic excellence and motivating students to achieve their goals. The scholarship programs of ADYPU intend to encourage students from different socio-cultural and economic backgrounds and help them pursue their educational goals. The university offers various types of scholarships, which are merit based as well as need based.
DFP-Banner

ADYPU offers many scholarships and one of them is Police Scholarship Program. This scholarship is exclusively offered to the wards of in-service Maharashtra Police Personnel. The scholarship criteria for the Police Scholarship Program is presented below:
Scholarship Name
Scholarship Amount
Scholarship Criteria
Police Scholarship Program
Read more: ADYPU_Police_Scholarship_Program

In order to apply for Ajeenkya DY Patil University Police Scholarship Program candidates need to fill a google application form that will be available on the official website. For more details, candidates can write to policescholarships@adypu.edu.in.
Quick Links
ADYPU Reviews
ADYPU Admission
tables:
Up to 50% scholarship fee
100% scholarship for students with more than 95% in Class 12

Students must be the ward of in-service Maharashtra Police Personnel
Police ID of parents
Students must clear all eligibility criteria set by ADYPU
Students must have enrolled to a full-time UG course
